name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Don't Let Walz Win
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Tim Walz is playing politics with our freedoms. The Governor and Legislature are tasked to pass a $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill and now Walz is waffling on calling the Special Session. He's most likely worried that his repeated lies and disinformation campaign is spelling political trouble for him. Mandating vaccines doesn't work well when people are waking up to his lies. And his approval rating is falling fast! Look at this recent fear mongering lie he made to the Strib: **We can't trust what this man says! More and more Minnesotans are starting to see through the lies.** Last week our team made 18,330 calls to voters across the state to bring real heat on politicians in St Paul. This was done because of **your support**! Politicians who refuse to get on board the Stop Vaccine Mandates train are in real trouble. The same swamp dwellers who told us we would not be able to End Walz' Emergency Powers before, are now underestimating the power we bring to the table on stopping mandates. We proved them wrong in June and we'll do it again! Action 4 Liberty doesn't waste time cozying up to the Swamp in St Paul. We go directly to the people. Because in the end of the day, politicians care about one thing: elections. We take our message to their voters. And that's what makes our programs work! This battle to Stop Vaccine Mandates is as important as they come. That's why our team is making calls around the clock. Hiring field staff is key to success - but it's not cheap. And I fear we won't be able to keep this up without your help. **We just rented a home near the Capitol to house all these young liberty professionals we brought in to fight for your rights. Please help us continue expanding these field operations by donating today.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=2 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=2)
---
We aren't like any other political organization out there. We go right for the jugular when it comes to political pain. And the Swamp has attacked us for it.
**Politicians had the House Sergeant-at-Arms[call us](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYwrP-O24yBG3Zu1qoe22Hi&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=3) and tell us to take down contact info for legislators on social media. We ignored their request.**
**Then the Democrat Party hired a Minneapolis Law Firm to file a[baseless campaign finance](https://www.action4liberty.com/dfl_s_fake_complaint_against_us_dismissed_by_cfb?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=4) complaint against us. We fought back and it was dismissed!**
**And recently, the Democrats cozied up to the top brass at the[State Fair to remove our "King Walz"](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_goes_back_up_on_state_fair_booth?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=5) sign from our booth. We sent them a letter from our lawyer, printed up a new sign and stuck it right back up on top!**
I learned from an early age two things: 1) do what you believe is right and 2) don't back down to bullies!
Our pressure campaign will continue on. We will NEVER BACK DOWN! Our field staff will continue making calls around the clock and our social media ads will continue to reach tens of thousands of Minnesota voters.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=6)
The Swamp would like to see us fail. And they will get this wish if we can't continue funding our field operations. So I need your help.
**Peter, help my team continue phone calls, doorknocks and running ads to Stop Vaccine Mandates in Minnesota!**
We're getting our message out to tens of thousands Minnesotans a week and we need your help by [**donating today**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=7). Don't let the Swamp win - your health freedom is at stake.
[**Please make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to Stop the Walz-Biden Vaccine Mandates.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=8)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Join Me and My Family this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,
I want to invite you, your family, your neighbors, and your friends to
attend a Meet and Greet I'm having on Saturday, October 9th to discuss Texas'
new 38th Congressional district and how we're going to take back the House in
2022, and stop Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. You'll have the chance to ask me
any questions you'd like, as well as the opportunity to meet my two wonderful
daughters, Victoria and Olivia, as well as my lovely wife, Emily.

The Meet and Greet will take place at the Brick House Tavern off of highway
249, from 3-5 PM. Please see the flyer for exact details. I hope to see you
there!

Sincerely,
Wesley

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=4987604ddda84679bed9f92312234a6e&_t=0qQfuWVczqZBV2ktrCRiQI_ZTxH9QL0xCnjCSRvYKU5tREHdNkdYFuceA_-YXdhtK_H4iNm__jYj-kjU9bz8_gG0ytHxnuCYTh-vCVq1aUfPiYrQpzeo6j3LF3AOXWiszKne9-SHXdGlWcB8L6Du6J_s39079Y8Mzd-6YG5sYOs%3D>
.

Donald J. Trump October 5th, 2021
Endorsement of Geoff Diehl
Republican gubernatorial candidate Geoff Diehl of Massachusetts looks very much forward to his run against "RINO" Governor Charlie Baker, who has done nothing for the Republican Party and has driven Massachusetts energy costs into, by far, the highest in the Nation—monthly electric bills, and all else, are not even close to being where they should be. Baker is bad on crime, disrespects our police, does nothing for our Veterans, has totally botched the Vaccination rollout, presided over the collapse of the MBTA, and has seen crime go to record levels. His “green climate” views are fresh out of the AOC playbook. He has totally abandoned the principles of the Republican Party, never cutting taxes and undermining our agenda. Baker is definitely not an American First or Make America Great Again kind of guy. Geoff Diehl, on the other hand, is a true patriot, a believer in low energy costs and our independent energy policy (which was just obliterated by the Biden Administration with energy costs soaring!). Geoff is strong on Crime, Election Integrity, our now under siege Southern Border, loves our Military, and has a big focus on taking care of our Vets. Geoff Diehl will be an outstanding Governor for the state of Massachusetts, and it is my honor to give him my Complete and Total Endorsement!

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump October 5th, 2021 Endorsement of Geoff Diehl Republican gubernatorial candidate Geoff Diehl of Massachusetts looks very much forward to his run against "RINO" Governor Charlie Baker, who has done nothing for the Republican Party and has driven Massachusetts energy costs into, by far, the highest in the Nation—monthly electric bills, and all else, are not even close to being where they should be. Baker is bad on crime, disrespects our police, does nothing for our Veterans, has totally botched the Vaccination rollout, presided over the collapse of the MBTA, and has seen crime go to record levels. His “green climate” views are fresh out of the AOC playbook. He has totally abandoned the principles of the Republican Party, never cutting taxes and undermining our agenda. Baker is definitely not an American First or Make America Great Again kind of guy. Geoff Diehl, on the other hand, is a true patriot, a believer in low energy costs and our independent energy policy (which was just obliterated by the Biden Administration with energy costs soaring!). Geoff is strong on Crime, Election Integrity, our now under siege Southern Border, loves our Military, and has a big focus on taking care of our Vets. Geoff Diehl will be an outstanding Governor for the state of Massachusetts, and it is my honor to give him my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. The last thing Nevada needs is Dean Heller as our last line of defense.
In the U.S. Senate, Heller _voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- which would have gutted protections for people with pre-existing conditions and returned us to the days of big insurance companies charging women more than men for the same coverage._
Heller even said he liked “what Texas did” on abortion and promised “the most conservative abortion laws we can have” in Nevada.
Dean Heller is a threat to Nevada, folks. **_[That’s why we’re asking for you to rush in a contribution to help re-elect Democratic Governor Steve Sisolak.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3GlizIcNi4ieFXsPcZLNZLoCdJcoKJA4BdrLPYGNw9PbwVKaJXKuvYnJ439PEj7wMsxVG60J23YVj1WhuHChHyOQ0UPp-GNjCKMk5V4C1YE7LuWIyKICg_-q-Rft5If0SJP33uiNmdctRvmpp1rydVbWEpsXx5e92ed0oL7YGnR-HoHCxXU0iU2jgt-Zu3-JMYm87AZparVhj46E6oY7Hrraow4RjkEZWmbZ3ZQZfO-j4kIcY8KjhgeVcihz-3A9bt3SyzE6tGy28w5RM8mO1t0SavWltSbGLALS2YTXBAA5GDupmf1MfLTTnngsdUx5XTNziOUrKrJ3SphixpaYFpdYCMoSS3fUgEWEkAPDMM-c2oQ/3fx/RH0OZ2GWSp-jekVOx44Jug/h3/BETWy653U0l6WDgn1Vx9mUS-jZCziZj4NzXYIQhyOvg)_**

clean_body: we need your help | | | | | URGENT: Trump lackey Dean Heller is within SINGLE DIGITS of defeating Democratic Governor Steve Sisolak. We need your help to fight back immediately: | | | The last thing Nevada needs is Dean Heller as our last line of defense. In the U.S. Senate, Heller voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- which would have gutted protections for people with pre-existing conditions and returned us to the days of big insurance companies charging women more than men for the same coverage. Heller even said he liked “what Texas did” on abortion and promised “the most conservative abortion laws we can have” in Nevada. Dean Heller is a threat to Nevada, folks. Steve Sisolak has been a progressive champion for women’s rights, labor unions, environmental protections, and a public health insurance option --and he’s led with science throughout this pandemic. But this latest poll shows him within single digits of Republican Dean Heller. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your help, Sioslak HQ | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Adam Schiff here — coming to you with an important message about Virginia’s elections 4 weeks away.

Republicans across the country are waging an all-out assault on our democracy. Texas, Florida, Georgia, and many other states have passed voter suppression laws in just the past few months, and hundreds of bills have been introduced in 49 state legislatures — including Virginia.

Not to mention, Trump Republicans in Virginia are sparing no expense to flip the governor’s seat and the state legislature in a few weeks. This could pave the way to secure wins in the 2022 Congressional midterm elections.

**This is a critical moment to fight back. And it all starts in Virginia in 2021.**

That’s why it’s so important that we support Terry McAuliffe and all Virginia Democrats running to keep our Blue majorities in their state House. Terry and the strong leaders in Virginia’s Democratic majority understand the stakes, and what we need to do now — **fight for justice, work towards creating a more perfect union, and ensure every voice is heard in our Democracy.**

We understand that in order to propel our country forward, we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. From school boards to governor's offices to the Oval Office. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today:

**[Can you split a donation between Terry McAuliffe’s Common Good PAC and our grassroots campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi12KDPQVA2R5xhKVNpMMd2urb3OmyLG5bsuEGjEpPzsXyMnFX-NQb2pfLoeahxn9zzF8lIJgiY8dM9CeNW-fD2_1hE8rrSCEJpVuyrXUlXACKGmKcjNBnAUXXULfitgbNK-bkOnMD2v4kDipxRo8_VpA1nMTbeWX0mxPHNRd7d2XKXZt2qbr0k6ErDDWEw83yXnEWI7PdO3JMe4JUin0O3DtVBcJlifyKPUsQq8PHY7XL65VswzEp0d71omwKXARRHnUA4QM4FKfyxU01azRcGT3lLeUH9eKZlQaeK_EkJFvIVyGleORE6blR0jxVIynHRULAd9CFkq8PO-jD8eff2Q/3fx/K3_mRQgDT1uGVFyJgdDv_A/h2/vKZFLZFM7ZlSKVHVcvVYRg6YdpXdCJN_eMLyeoWxQcA)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi12KDPQVA2R5xhKVNpMMd2gf3U2QlejyO0E2hzv0FP79UUuLhJz8uGGTwxe7mEuHwuuvNix3JgjBu1U8NkukxyQQaCH-575jygEQtgN6OaqtD2MOhCaLqMGCO6TgP-_VTh6omovzPc8kM9Lucfjy-EnYEphUZ7toc7rOvEhpjOsVa4G32L6mgVO8pIYAotC1Ynq8zinehQLNUZdfaknYPeFW4vIWe5x90N3bRuYIqM5A40cuOtLPwslODxNP25bklXZN_4xOwBYowUh9x2jHRqwSHKGLKjCT3WN46F6x21-YQ006lA-biTEOUH5-xbfhJ08jJ-foNoEE01Pfez1cm1Byn5cueJ38il-Lgn-hfXAs/3fx/K3_mRQgDT1uGVFyJgdDv_A/h3/uKhFiTD4sPx-v_y7n7RJdQXVDJq4lvG05_LFrP2UQec)

Fellow American,

We only launched our Senate campaign six weeks ago, but make no mistake - the battle for the Senate majority has been underway for months.

body:
|
| | | Hey Peter, Taylor wanted me to check up on you. (Please read below.) We have invited you to renew your exclusive membership to our 1776 Donor Club several times. We're really disappointed you haven't taken us up on our offer yet! We NEED good and true Conservatives like YOU to stand up for Trump's legacy! We really thought we could count on you. Can we depend on you to join ASAP to make sure your membership remains active?
---

---

Can you make sure they saw our message about their TERMINATED membership to our 1776 Donor Club? We've reached out time and time again with no luck, and I am getting discouraged. I'm starting to wonder if they are still the Top Trump Patriot we thought they were. _[Let me know ASAP. This is important. **AS YOU KNOW, the Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable.** From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated were invited to join the 1776 Donor Club: **including you!**

Will you decide to step up to the plate one more time for Trump and for America and renew your 1776 Donor Club Membership? **We are ONLY inviting our TOP Trump Patriots to re-up their status as a member.**

")**
245 years ago, our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history: _**AMERICA**_. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. _**But now, those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone. We are depending on you to renew your membership...

name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Show them what you're made of
body:
The Indiana Democratic Party, together with the DNC and ASDC Best Practices Institute, is excited to announce the launch of our Campañas con Calidad (3C) Spanish Language Training Program! Campañas con Calidad is a free, six-part, on-demand training course that covers a variety of campaign skills needed to run successful campaigns. 3C trainings are conducted entirely in Spanish, and are targeted towards Spanish speaking individuals who are looking to organize and win campaigns in Latinx communities. These trainings are available for on-demand viewing in the BPI Victory Vault to commemorate National Hispanic Heritage Month! [**WANT TO RUN FOR OFFICE? LET US KNOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37107929/310099573/360374246?BPI.Candidate.10.06.21.EnglishAgain=BPI.Candidate.10.06.21.EnglishAgain&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDFlYjQzZS04YzI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqIh7CHGjvKZHJe1wOgW0b7VulExMrcLVgwP4TN8wSs=&emci=41468233-0726-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=1d1eb43e-8c26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4925535) Training topics include framing and relational organizing, field organizing, digital mobilization, technology, communications, and fundraising. Campañas con Calidad es una programa de capacitación en línea, gratis, de seis partes, que cubre una variedad de habilidades de campaña necesarias para construir campañas exitosas. Los entrenamientos de 3C se llevan a cabo íntegramente en español y están dirigidos a personas de habla hispana para ganar campañas en comunidades latinx. **ALERT: OUR BORDER IS OVERWHELMED!** It's time to secure our border and put an end to Biden's immigration crisis. **[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476914:J7jo2I2NY:m:1:3253819041:B67DD68268E7B914933A247D0CB0A134:r) ** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476914:J7jo2I2NY:m:1:3253819041:B67DD68268E7B914933A247D0CB0A134:r) | |

Peter, President Biden has turned immigration into a humanitarian crisis.

For months, we've faced a record number of undocumented migrants flooding our southern border from all over Mexico and central America.

Now, somehow, we've got thousands of Haitian refugees attempting to come in through Texas. _(You 've seen the pictures, I'm sure.)_

❌ No one is asking HOW these migrants got to our border.
❌ No one is reporting the reason they came through Mexico is BECAUSE of Biden's open border policies.
❌ And no one is being clear about where we draw the line on Biden's disastrous immigration policies.

**I 'm drawing the line NOW. **If we don't, it's never going to stop. And today, I want you to join me in demanding we secure our border and hold Biden accountable.
[**SECURE THE BORDER: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476914:J7jo2I2NY:m:1:3253819041:B67DD68268E7B914933A247D0CB0A134:r)
[**SECURE THE BORDER: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476914:J7jo2I2NY:m:1:3253819041:B67DD68268E7B914933A247D0CB0A134:r)

[**SECURE THE BORDER: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476914:J7jo2I2NY:m:1:3253819041:B67DD68268E7B914933A247D0CB0A134:r)
Peter, Biden's border failures are too great to ignore.
* He's dismantled Trump-era policies that protected our country.
* He's encouraged sanctuary cities.
* He continues to invite millions into our country, despite the fact that all authorities have said they are overwhelmed and cannot properly track the influx of individuals.

It's a complete disaster. And without us demanding better, there'd be no end in sight.****

**[I AGREE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476914:J7jo2I2NY:m:1:3253819041:B67DD68268E7B914933A247D0CB0A134:r) **

President Biden, Vice President Harris, and the mainstream media will continue to operate as if this enormous burden on our country doesn't even exist.

**But I won't.**

We must protect America first, and to do that we're going to have to stand together to reject this destructive open-borders agenda.

[**Please chip in today to join the fight.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476914:J7jo2I2NY:m:1:3253819041:B67DD68268E7B914933A247D0CB0A134:r)

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: What’s happening in Washington right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Friend,

I’m sure you’ve been hearing a lot about what’s going on in Washington right now, so I wanted to make sure you knew what I’m working on.

The two bills making headlines the most are the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act -- which will refurbish tens of thousands of miles of roads, fix thousands of bridges, and update our country's crumbling infrastructure -- and the Build Back Better Act -- which will make huge investments in combating climate change and follow through on the promise we made to America to build back better.

These are once-in-a-generation investments in our future that I’m working with my Democratic colleagues to get passed in the House, and I’m dedicated to ensuring that both of them reach President Biden’s desk so you can rest easier knowing that our country is recovering.

I’ve got to get back to work, but I’ll make sure to keep you updated on what is happening in Washington.

Thanks for sticking with me,

Lisa Blunt Rochester

Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

name: Julianna
subject: Peter, I’m mad.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [unitethecountry
body:
| Frankly, Peter, I’m mad.
* As the nation hurtles toward its first-ever default on our debt on October 18th (thanks to Donald Trump’s reckless tax and spending policies), which would create catastrophic economic turmoil, **Republicans BLOCK any action to raise or suspend the U.S. debt ceiling.**

* As President Biden works around the clock to unite Congress behind the Build Back Better agenda and make critical investments in our infrastructure, **Republican groups invest nearly $3 million in attack ads to derail Biden’s historic plan.**

* As the Delta variant is surging across the world and we read harrowing stories about young, healthy children in the ICU, **Republicans spread misinformation about COVID-19 vaccines, fight mask mandates, and then try to blame Democrats.**

**[Here’s the point, Peter: I’ve had enough, and we cannot sit on the sidelines while Republicans try to score political points with Donald Trump’s base at the expense of our democracy. If we don’t act _now_ , these are the people who will control Congress in just 15 months. clean_body: | Frankly, Peter, I’m mad. As the nation hurtles toward its first-ever default on our debt on October 18th (thanks to Donald Trump’s reckless tax and spending policies), which would create catastrophic economic turmoil, Republicans BLOCK any action to raise or suspend the U.S. debt ceiling. As President Biden works around the clock to unite Congress behind the Build Back Better agenda and make critical investments in our infrastructure, Republican groups invest nearly $3 million in attack ads to derail Biden’s historic plan. As the Delta variant is surging across the world and we read harrowing stories about young, healthy children in the ICU, Republicans spread misinformation about COVID-19 vaccines, fight mask mandates, and then try to blame Democrats. = Because despite everything Republican leaders say and do right now, they’re dominating the news cycle and gaining in the polls. That’s why we are emailing you right now. The future of our country and our democracy are on the line next year. subject: an angry leftist mob
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476962:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r) Peter, **It 's official: Gretchen Whitmer has a challenger for Michigan Governor that has the Democrats shaking in their boots.** Someone who is not a politician. Someone who has a record of serving the people of Michigan and getting real results. Someone even the Detroit News is talking about as a challenger that will leave the Democrats flat-footed. So who is this candidate? **It 's Chief James Craig, the former Detroit police chief and Michigan's next governor...** How do we know they're scared?****_They sent a group of thugs to rush the stage and try to disrupt our announcement event in Detroit. _ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476962:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r) **That 's right, on national television they tried to take over our event and tried to shout the chief down.** _Believe me, as Chief of Police in Detroit, Chief Craig has taken on much tougher groups than this._ There is no way they're going to deter him from taking on Gretchen Whtimer, and there is NO WAY THEY ARE GOING TO STOP US FROM MAKING REAL CHANGES to the way things are run.
This chief is going to stand up. **[Will you make a donation right now and stand up with him?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476962:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r)**
Let us tell you a little bit about why his entry into the race this month is turning heads across Michigan... and across the country.
Before he had even declared that he was running, Tucker Carlson invited Chief Craig on his show. They talked about why Michigan needs real leadership - and you should see what Tucker had to say about his time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020: _" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters."_ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476962:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r) His 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order. See, the Chief grew up in Detroit during the '67 riots, seeing tanks rolling down the streets and snipers on the roofs. He was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened. The police retreated, and let their city burn. He saw that happen. **Since he 's been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated.**
When he came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. The Chief started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. He made it an example. The police mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, they cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476962:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r) Then, the Chief went into the city and met with every group he could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, **_Detroit did not burn_**.
Leadership - real leadership - matters. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?
Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.
You don't see much of that out there. **That 's why he crisscrossed the state this month announcing his candidacy for Governor of Michigan. ** The Chief believes in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why we're inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476962:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r)** [**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476962:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r) Sometimes people are surprised to hear that the Chief is a Republican. He grew up a Democrat. But then he watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. He watched as they pushed handouts that increased dependency on the government for political gain. **And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT his values. He voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.** _**And we 're pretty sure you can guess HIS position on "Defund the Police!"**_ Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front. **Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join us in supporting Chief James Craig for Governor?** _**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**_ [**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476962:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r) [**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476963:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r) [**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476964:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r) [**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476965:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r) [**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58476966:J3PIII20N:m:1:3253819041:12F469DA8DDE3C18B7442842F8408A24:r) __**If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**__ | |

Since he 's been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. When he came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. The Chief started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. He made it an example. The police mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, they cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front. Then, the Chief went into the city and met with every group he could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, Detroit did not burn. Leadership - real leadership - matters. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that? Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership. You don't see much of that out there. That 's why he crisscrossed the state this month announcing his candidacy for Governor of Michigan. The Chief believes in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why we're inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. Sometimes people are surprised to hear that the Chief is a Republican. He grew up a Democrat. But then he watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. He watched as they pushed handouts that increased dependency on the government for political gain. And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT his values. He voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly. And we 're pretty sure you can guess HIS position on "Defund the Police!" Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front. Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join us in supporting Chief James Craig for Governor? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.** | | - Chief James Craig Team Contributions to Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle. | | | Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 | | | | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-43801851085-echo7-D720625317FEDDACEA42A0717B23C1F8@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Eric Lynn
subject: Looking for your input
body:
I want to be your voice to Washington. Can you let me know your thoughts?

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HEggqgf2iKbUCMMRdrM6fkHOWIqxZdDlwDaw-_3yu6A=/1mDzSzpXMW7yvJgxryEExOh1vXkv_XumevMMM7-_iEc=) Dear friends, Thanks to President Biden, our Democratic majorities, and hardworking Americans who have stepped up to support each other during this pandemic, America's economy is coming back. **There 's so much work left to be done, and I want to know what issues matter most to you.** Here in Pinellas County, we hear from people every day who want bold action on voting rights, infrastructure, protecting the environment, LGBTQ equality, racial equity, and more. Your input is critical to our campaign, and we want to hear from you directly. [**If you have a minute or two, please click here to take our priorities survey and make your voice heard on the issues that matter most to you.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HEggqgf2iKbUCMMRdrM6fkHOWIqxZdDlwDaw-_3yu6A=/ari6LU29aOWOdVzVZlGhylMvu797ysgFT-azgSwYOzg=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HEggqgf2iKbUCMMRdrM6fkHOWIqxZdDlwDaw-_3yu6A=/ari6LU29aOWOdVzVZlGhylMvu797ysgFT-azgSwYOzg=) Here in Florida and in Washington, Republicans have eroded our institutions and restricted our rights. This race for Florida's 13th Congressional District is a major battleground in our fight. From my years as a senior advisor to President Obama and working in Congress, I know how to get things done in Washington. [**Friends, I 'm running to be your voice in Congress and I promise to make an impact on the issues that matter most to you. Please click here to take our brief priorities survey today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HEggqgf2iKbUCMMRdrM6fkHOWIqxZdDlwDaw-_3yu6A=/ari6LU29aOWOdVzVZlGhylMvu797ysgFT-azgSwYOzg=) Warmly, Eric Lynn **[Contribute](https://act.myngp.com/el/HEggqgf2iKbUCMMRdrM6fkHOWIqxZdDlwDaw-_3yu6A=/l6UJMb4SDunvFJ705ZA-XqrFLD4DfBbpESdrxXSlph4=)** Eric Lynn for Congress

St. Petersburg FL 33733 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/HEggqgf2iKbUCMMRdrM6fkHOWIqxZdDlwDaw-_3yu6A=/BgFkblJs6Ojz02FHyySxRrWm9xq6_0WQdcMfigCa8ec=). |

Between holding Madison Cawthorn accountable for his disturbing and dangerous rhetoric, and taking charge of reaching out to voters -- by door-knocking, phone banking, and listening to folks about what they need from their elected officials -- we are proving that we have what it takes to bring real leadership back to Western NC. Nothing shows the power of a grassroots team more than a long list of supporters stepping up early on. We can show our opponents our strength in numbers, and the more everyday people we have to endorse Jasmine, the stronger our movement will be. | | Thank you for your support. \-- Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37126221/310151401/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2Q1YTIxNC1iNjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m5OCgTxcy8Ulu3bLZHV2y0aGAApRokM-haOuQsMcbJg=)

| | Folks, I was a legislator in the North Carolina House for the past ten years, and I’ll be the first to tell you that I don’t play politics -- instead, I study, I listen, and I vote my conscience. **And you can expect me to do the same in Congress** \-- here’s how I plan to flip NC-09 blue. [**Before I dive into the details, will you become a Founding Donor of my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37126222/310151402/-1734542917?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211006_FR_Launch3_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2Q1YTIxNC1iNjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m5OCgTxcy8Ulu3bLZHV2y0aGAApRokM-haOuQsMcbJg=) | | | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37126223/310151403/-1734542917?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211006_FR_Launch3_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2Q1YTIxNC1iNjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m5OCgTxcy8Ulu3bLZHV2y0aGAApRokM-haOuQsMcbJg=)
---
**Lead with Integrity**
* * *
When I say I vote my conscience, I mean it. You can expect me to be loyal to my constituents and my gut _alone_ \-- I won’t be giving **any** special interests the time of day. I also promise to always be transparent and truthful. For too long, folks have been kept in the dark about what goes on behind closed doors in the halls of Congress. That changes with me.
**Reach Across the Aisle**
* * *
I’m also planning on reaching across the aisle to actually get things done for North Carolina and the American people. I’ve served in the NC House for ten years, and during that time I learned how to work with anyone -- regardless of their party affiliation -- to deliver results on the issues that matter to my constituents.
**Represent Marginalized Communities**
* * *
I grew up in a rural farming community -- my parents and grandparents were sharecroppers. I’ve also been the only Native American in the NC House during my tenure, so I know a thing or two about advocating for folks who are traditionally left out of the conversation.
For example, I sponsored a bill requiring solid waste management permits to be rejected if they will hurt surrounding minority or poor neighborhoods, because what we’ve seen for decades in many of our marginalized and rural communities are a few multinational corporations that, when left unchecked, cause harm to our drinking water and our clean air, all without regard to the surrounding communities.
**Build a Powerful Grassroots Team**
* * *
Here’s where you come in, folks. I need your help to build a truly powerful grassroots team that can spread our message to every corner of the district -- from Monroe to Sandhill and Lumberton.
You’ve already blown my team and I away with your support over the last few days, but if you haven’t donated yet and my plan to flip this seat sounds good to you, [**will you become a Founding Donor today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37126224/310151404/-1734542917?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211006_FR_Launch3_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2Q1YTIxNC1iNjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m5OCgTxcy8Ulu3bLZHV2y0aGAApRokM-haOuQsMcbJg=)
| | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37126232/310151410/-1734542917?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211006_FR_Launch3_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2Q1YTIxNC1iNjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m5OCgTxcy8Ulu3bLZHV2y0aGAApRokM-haOuQsMcbJg=)

clean_body: | = | | Folks, I was a legislator in the North Carolina House for the past ten years, and I’ll be the first to tell you that I don’t play politics -- instead, I study, I listen, and I vote my conscience. And you can expect me to do the same in Congress \-- here’s how I plan to flip NC-09 blue. = | | | = Lead with Integrity When I say I vote my conscience, I mean it. You can expect me to be loyal to my constituents and my gut alone \-- I won’t be giving any special interests the time of day. I also promise to always be transparent and truthful. For too long, folks have been kept in the dark about what goes on behind closed doors in the halls of Congress. That changes with me. Reach Across the Aisle I’m also planning on reaching across the aisle to actually get things done for North Carolina and the American people. I’ve served in the NC House for ten years, and during that time I learned how to work with anyone -- regardless of their party affiliation -- to deliver results on the issues that matter to my constituents. Represent Marginalized Communities I grew up in a rural farming community -- my parents and grandparents were sharecroppers. I’ve also been the only Native American in the NC House during my tenure, so I know a thing or two about advocating for folks who are traditionally left out of the conversation. For example, I sponsored a bill requiring solid waste management permits to be rejected if they will hurt surrounding minority or poor neighborhoods, because what we’ve seen for decades in many of our marginalized and rural communities are a few multinational corporations that, when left unchecked, cause harm to our drinking water and our clean air, all without regard to the surrounding communities. Build a Powerful Grassroots Team Here’s where you come in, folks. I need your help to build a truly powerful grassroots team that can spread our message to every corner of the district -- from Monroe to Sandhill and Lumberton. You’ve already blown my team and I away with your support over the last few days, but if you haven’t donated yet and my plan to flip this seat sounds good to you, = | | = I’m looking forward to working with each and every one of you as our momentum continues to build. Thanks, Charles = | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. Friends — Back in 2010, Democrats held the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives by impressive margins. With 60 votes in the Senate, Democrats passed the Affordable Care Act, protecting those with preexisting conditions and helping more than 20 million people gain insurance coverage. And a few months later, we saw huge electoral defeats, losing half a dozen Senate seats and the House majority. The GOP blocked all meaningful progress in sight, even refusing to hold hearings for Merrick Garland’s nomination to the Supreme Court — _Democrats were paralyzed at the hands of Mitch McConnell._ **And in 2022, our work is at risk again. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Three years ago today: Sen. Grassley’s crowning achievement.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter – **t******h** ree years ago today, Brett Kavanaugh was sworn in as a Supreme Court justice. **My memories from that day, and those intense feelings of anger, hopelessness and determination, continue to fuel me in my campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA). As thousands took to the streets in protest and countless others huddled quietly around TV screens wondering what this meant for them and their families, Sens. Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell were celebrating.
You see, as then chair of the Judiciary Committee, Sen. Grassley bears direct responsibility for Kavanaugh's confirmation – as well as a great deal of damage done to our entire judicial branch of government. Sen. Grassley conspired with Mitch McConnell to block consideration of President Obama's Supreme Court nominee for months (nearly 300 days, to be exact). But, when Donald Trump was in office, he rammed through Kavanaugh's confirmation, even with all the controversy surrounding his nomination and qualifications.
Confirming Kavanaugh is one of Sen. Grassley's proudest accomplishments, and it's no wonder why. Kavanaugh's vote on the court has advanced Sen. Grassley's radical agenda time and time again: the Voting Rights Act has been decimated, giving GOP-led states a green light to pass extreme voter suppression laws, and Kavanaugh's vote allowed the Texas abortion ban to go into effect, gutting Roe v. Wade's protections in our country's second-most populous state.
With so much damage already done, Mitch McConnell is now vowing to block any of President Biden's Supreme Court nominees if Republicans take back the majority. **If that happens, Sen. Grassley could once again hold the gavel on the Judiciary Committee and move our highest court even further to the right. We cannot let that happen. We must defeat Sen. Grassley in Iowa and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**
**I have every intention of winning this race, and I will fight with everything I have to defeat Sen. Grassley – but I can't do it without grassroots resources.[So today, in remembering what a consequential moment this was for our country – and how Sen. Grassley orchestrated it – I'm asking you to donate to flip Iowa blue and protect the future of our Supreme Court. $10, $20, $50, whatever you can spare – every dollar matters in building a campaign that can defeat Sen. Grassley. clean_body: | | | Peter – t**h ree years ago today, Brett Kavanaugh was sworn in as a Supreme Court justice. My memories from that day, and those intense feelings of anger, hopelessness and determination, continue to fuel me in my campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA). As thousands took to the streets in protest and countless others huddled quietly around TV screens wondering what this meant for them and their families, Sens. Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell were celebrating. You see, as then chair of the Judiciary Committee, Sen. Grassley bears direct responsibility for Kavanaugh's confirmation – as well as a great deal of damage done to our entire judicial branch of government. Sen. Grassley conspired with Mitch McConnell to block consideration of President Obama's Supreme Court nominee for months (nearly 300 days, to be exact). But, when Donald Trump was in office, he rammed through Kavanaugh's confirmation, even with all the controversy surrounding his nomination and qualifications. Confirming Kavanaugh is one of Sen. Grassley's proudest accomplishments, and it's no wonder why. Kavanaugh's vote on the court has advanced Sen. Grassley's radical agenda time and time again: the Voting Rights Act has been decimated, giving GOP-led states a green light to pass extreme voter suppression laws, and Kavanaugh's vote allowed the Texas abortion ban to go into effect, gutting Roe v. Wade's protections in our country's second-most populous state. With so much damage already done, Mitch McConnell is now vowing to block any of President Biden's Supreme Court nominees if Republicans take back the majority. If that happens, Sen. Grassley could once again hold the gavel on the Judiciary Committee and move our highest court even further to the right. We cannot let that happen. We must defeat Sen. Grassley in Iowa and protect our Democratic Senate majority. I have every intention of winning this race, and I will fight with everything I have to defeat Sen. Grassley – but I can't do it without grassroots resources.=** With gratitude, Abby | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

Hello friend,
I'm Congresswoman Annie Kuster and I want to take a minute to share with you why **I'm proud to endorse former**** State Senator Kirsten Engel for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37131747/310160421/558373307?refcode=X_100621_Endorsment_Kuster&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTE3MjQ0NC1iYTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCpcSno3Z-FK_5GqQLUIUbh74_l6UIqLLVsKYOB5kxo=)
---
Kirsten's top priority has, and always will be, the needs of her constituents. As a Congresswoman, I have no doubt she will continue to uphold the values of Southern Arizona. Quite simply, we need more women and more leaders like her in Congress.
**As an environmental attorney and water policy expert, Kirsten understands the science and the urgency to act on climate now, invest in renewable energy, and conserve our natural resources. **
Kirsten is hands-down the best choice for Southern Arizona and I look forward to working with her in Congress on these important issues.
[**Will you join me in supporting Kirsten by chipping in?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37131748/310160423/558373307?refcode=X_100621_Endorsment_Kuster&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTE3MjQ0NC1iYTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCpcSno3Z-FK_5GqQLUIUbh74_l6UIqLLVsKYOB5kxo=)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Will you give me a chance to explain please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since winning. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6Fvcj5X40-69Rb1tA5atHcJQ8a6IJR5mR5rivvEUnXPnqp4-c9xlkFDAQfHELYTX6cjOkYfVKPFwkrdO1Y4DvjC2tBkgI9wemtQAuXesguUeRpNtj_DZGzMHfQvRvORoZ_InTjWrpKybABA3kVbCWMhRLmErlEvOA9q-cXKdiec9yXIqTdweFVqOM-1yorQm-2zmka71ZYCfB6IclONqYANHuZZoxjYLdSq6VTmGg2C-0ZNyR7y62Hvl5achFwtorB6AhHfr4MpHK2gn9PXn2afUI_mhV1Oj_qqYhugRtPcnkoTS3usQMIq7OvlZDv5HIDA/3fx/lnFLwguZQyKc79KqT6ojcA/h0/UCEDsSzh4H3JzU328ChaxSHLZnSmOoyZHTGRiAtP5Kc)
Derek -

In just a moment, **[I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Common Good VA.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6Fvcj5X40-69Rb1tA5atHcJTj8myOfG5Jzi17exyjwd4Q9yXdeuTWP7Iy3BqmKhajLU7eEB0gxHIssS3Tjnvzzo90K_CtYALFSu5tKlCa2B8rlnTtyfYq01J9XHDpoaXdpWYTemY66jyuucAp0i-4JmKj-XgCsB8eu8Nl-dXZJ4FbWO9UyzgTuVFsS_02pLWOCUrjUPpLNyY17t_kPwm7K5w0MjpqzmC-4UgQ2hx4ua3GACB0kJHiRkKekCV92-WjFQycSzpCVeNjC8DsO503TBWP11DEBfoBLfm8ydZFNy9TvymStZcb8UKJoKiyu51i8g/3fx/lnFLwguZQyKc79KqT6ojcA/h1/KhzD8i2EOWQdzTrAEBrb5ZQ3reTNP8UJVMLEdnBzFYw)** Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.

Here is the truth:

When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office.

Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona.

So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, **[I am asking you to split a $15 donation between our campaign and Common Good VA to help me fight back.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6Fg44lg6103lc7aQJk1FnaNB_T8cu3rqzOJF9B6-cC4OSt0Bf29TuMhoMdUqUlwcScEU1Ux9_7Ug4K6Z3ecXWKf3dgoO3Us9gKJIW2K8zxvC5XSuHtcwf_zYZ5DHZjIm_Ff1jlUjDXbD_Yj5-Q574J5kXbMPsiVDf1De_DEQQtlopV_Tq-NzcXHv-Ff42q5g_g-bOzJ-XURf4Dbgq3XhWQjoDsKwkr77fuDYos2BBnoFqXodByM40S5HP6erWA1YZjSjNqbcv0R8RMyHRfcSD_TUs1tnWZmQ_GHDAcPMzOVvAkCPK7ynfM7rMo41r-1cO2l0nD0xMhe2vyVxv_o6x_jU/3fx/lnFLwguZQyKc79KqT6ojcA/h2/-Ax3VhFNjWKRMzMkQAnw_7IkfDHBu7oxOlAgP-Yqzag)**

I know $15 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can beat multi-million dollar ad campaigns targeting me, but by the time you got to this point in the email, someone else added their own $15. And they’re hoping you do the same.

It all adds up, and that’s how we win: together. So I am asking:

**[Can you please split a $15 contribution between my campaign and Common Good VA to start off October strong? clean_body: When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since winning. | | | Derek - In just a moment, Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here is the truth: When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office. Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona. So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, I know $15 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can beat multi-million dollar ad campaigns targeting me, but by the time you got to this point in the email, someone else added their own $15. And they’re hoping you do the same. It all adds up, and that’s how we win: together. So I am asking: Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means a lot. \- Mark | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our natio
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoaucafid6fuvn105obhe5cl4m42buerdllb03n0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clj66o36c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zem5phmtp822q6agrve1qdb8q32ki0bdrrg7q4h0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clj66o36c1h2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi5rcu75p3n98dn4evcj13h6nkiq10iid4jf88e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clj66o36c1h2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zs3vau6v5dhni28a3k0gk38jkuarl9ajhahnahe0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zptlc2itk799u5gkks8i4rnf2867tcm0j4uul2mo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cpimcor0cpg649fg)

You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Dr Neil Shah
subject: Walz, Fauci and Your Christmas
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_fauci_and_your_christmas&n=1) Peter, The pandemic is over. But you wouldn’t know it if you listened to the fear-mongering public health officials like Anthony Fauci. On an appearance with Face the Nation this last Sunday, Fauci said it was “too soon” to know if you can celebrate the holidays with your family and friends. **It appears these fear promoters want more people to buy into getting the jab, so they are holding Thanksgiving and Christmas hostage for the second year in a row. Your rights and your quality of life are secondary to their agenda!** But I’m not okay with letting these fear promoters and their career politician buddies continue to erode the American way of life. This campaign is about **Saving Minnesota from career politicians** who continue to destroy this state, and our country. Your rights are under the greatest assault of our lifetime, and we can’t turn to people in the political class to solve this problem. For instance, there’s a special session on the horizon in the Minnesota legislature. They are meeting to pass a $250 Million bill that distributes tax money to frontline workers. The political class is bickering and arguing about how many people to consider “frontline workers”. They want to make sure to give as much money to their special interest groups as possible. Meanwhile, Walz and Biden have done something unprecedented: they are mandating vaccinations of hundreds of millions of Americans. **Career politicians are doing NOTHING to protect your freedom.** But Rep Erik Mortensen, who comes from the business world (like me), is standing up for your rights. He drafted a Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment that he’ll introduce in the special session to make sure the $250 Million bill doesn’t pass unless it protects your health freedom. I applaud this move and endorse it fully. Mortensen will likely encounter resistance from Tim Walz and the political class. Which is the reason we need to eventually Fire Walz and replace him with someone who is not a career politician. But Mortensen is a fighter, and we should support him in this endeavor. If I’m your governor, we will go on the offense in this battle for health freedom. Career politicians on the Republican side keep putting us on the defense. That’s why we’re in this whole predicament right now. It’s time to reverse course on the crop of Republicans we send to St Paul. It’s time we send real fighters. **Please join me in learning how we can Save Minnesota from career politicians. If you are**[**willing to volunteer**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rHIMENRQT5AKoWG-e4wjsE6PmOi69xTq33Skw-UbFh4z&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_fauci_and_your_christmas&n=2)**, please sign up and I’ll have a member from our team reach out to you soon. We also could use your financial support, since we aren’t funded by special interests and lobbyists like my career politician opponents.**[**Donations of $25, $50 or more go a long way to helping us Save Minnesota**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_fauci_and_your_christmas&n=3)**!** **Thank you!** **** Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_fauci_and_your_christmas&n=4) Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_fauci_and_your_christmas&n=5). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_fauci_and_your_christmas&n=6), software for leaders.

clean_body: Will you be on his Official Donor List? | Authorized by Elect Republicans HQ Peter, On October 9, President Trump will take the stage at his next major SAVE AMERICA RALLY in the Battleground State of Iowa, and we’re pleading with you to make sure your name is on our Official List of supporters before he does. DON’T FORGET: President Trump checks a list of every Republican Patriot who donates to help Save America before he takes the stage. Will your name be at the top, Peter? Or will he notice you’re not there? | | | | | | President Trump has made is abundantly clear that he’s seriously considering running for the White House again in 2024. But first, he’s rallying in Battleground States across the nation to help elect Republicans and win back the House Majority. Recent polls show that President Trump LEADS Joe Biden by double-digits in a potential rematch. We’ve got momentum! That’s why it’s so very important that every Republican Patriot (including you!) chips in to Stand with Trump and help us keep fighting to Save America. Thank you. Trump Rally Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

Derek,

name: Peter Franchot
subject: We need to pass the abortion rights amendment
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
This weekend, I was honored to join the Women’s March in Annapolis to rally in defense of abortion rights. In recent weeks, we’ve watched in horror as Texas legislators passed the most restrictive anti-abortion law in the country. This law is a shameful and unconstitutional attack on the rights of women, and Americans everywhere need to continue speaking out against it.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/FfPLNPx830iyEnk_kWBxYQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FfPLNPx830iyEnk_kWBxYQ2]As Governor, I will oppose any attempts to restrict women's reproductive rights. Roe v. Wade is the law of the land -- and under my watch, we’re going to take even bolder steps to protect the right to choose. That’s why I am calling on the Maryland legislature to pass the constitutional amendment bill to enshrine the right to abortion in the state’s constitution.
I am asking you to join me in the fight to protect and expand reproductive rights. Will you add your name to my petition urging the Maryland legislature to pass the abortion rights amendment bill? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FfPLNPx830iyEnk_kWBxYQ2]
In addition to passing this constitutional amendment, we also need to ask ourselves what we are doing to ensure that healthcare providers include abortions and related services in their coverage. Abortion is healthcare, and the right to choose shouldn’t just be for the rich, the wealthy, and the powerful.
I believe that we should also create an abortion care service fund for undocumented immigrants, and those who are not currently eligible for Medicaid coverage. There is no question of affordability here -- the State of Maryland has $5 billion in the bank thanks to tax revenue collected as a result of COVID stimulus funds, and I believe that we need to put it to good use helping our most vulnerable communities.
Together, let’s make our voices heard that we need to protect and expand the right to an abortion in Maryland. Add your name to my petition urging the Maryland legislature to pass the abortion rights amendment bill. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FfPLNPx830iyEnk_kWBxYQ2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?amount=20.22&refcode=em100621]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/56da0794-0026-ec11-981f-501ac510a405/f67626ac-ca26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjc2MjZhYy1jYTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NHBA9tsCKYlkJB91dKqvSLRi5y1KSPrZkTxzj-OX0DI=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37138801/310185375/-1739877693?refcode=20211006_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzFiY2QxNC1jYzI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd5oSfXBXIM_Epww_kObeTV5M6qudJXwacDDMr3ebn0=) Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37138802/310185376/-68044773?refcode=20211006_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzFiY2QxNC1jYzI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd5oSfXBXIM_Epww_kObeTV5M6qudJXwacDDMr3ebn0=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37138803/310185377/-1739877693?refcode=20211006_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzFiY2QxNC1jYzI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd5oSfXBXIM_Epww_kObeTV5M6qudJXwacDDMr3ebn0=)

But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. [**If you believe that Greene is unfit to serve -- chip in now to help me and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC stop the radical right. A donation of $25, $50, or $100 will go such a long way in ensuring that we can defeat hatred in our communities.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37138804/310185378/-68044773?refcode=20211006_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzFiY2QxNC1jYzI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd5oSfXBXIM_Epww_kObeTV5M6qudJXwacDDMr3ebn0=) Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37138805/310185379/-1739877693?refcode=20211006_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzFiY2QxNC1jYzI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jd5oSfXBXIM_Epww_kObeTV5M6qudJXwacDDMr3ebn0=)

Patriot,

While I’m running for Congress, I had to take on the Biden Regime’s agenda to normalize Sharia Law and Islamic “traditions” that include religious bigotry, violence, spousal abuse, sexism, racism and homophobia.

It’s dumb, because as a sitting member of Congress with voting power, Webster should know al-Qaeda, NOT the Taliban killed, 2,981 people on September 11th.

And twenty years later, as part of the Democrats’ growing Critical Race Theory agenda, **Joe Biden wants to teach our school children about the “Islamic faith” while ignoring the ongoing war that Jihadis have been waging against the West for decades!**

Do you want a member of Congress who speaks the truth about Islam or hides their head in the sand?

You know where I stand, and if you agree, [**watch this ad, share it, and help me air it**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/RX7cThBsyus892PI892rKn9Cpg/RASlMX21g7fLXkWzvxd7kw).

# **Friend — Joe Biden’s regime has taken us one step closer to completely open borders and no immigration enforcement whatsoever. **

---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a4ab85e3d256116a/9ad4f3af0820a6cec3d6b838967d376c)
|
---
Joe Biden and Kamala Harris guaranteed open borders. Since taking power, they’ve kept that promise and tried to end every single one of President Trump’s policies that made the border more secure.

Now they’re trying to dismantle immigration and the rule of law altogether.

**What do YOU think about this?**[**Do you support the rule of law, or do you stand with Democrats who want open borders and an end to immigration enforcement?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a4ab85e3d256116a/146f3d077f082c06c3d6b838967d376c)

We need to immediately secure the border by returning to President Trump’s policies that worked.

And we need to enforce the law, not end immigration enforcement altogether.

**That’s what I think at least. I want to know where YOU stand, Friend.**

[**Let me know now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a4ab85e3d256116a/8501f9a28b4fccc9c3d6b838967d376c)
