name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Stop forced COVID vax on campus
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5bbkm2g90u1fgq4td5gpqj3b7810v7pior8d0a8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clgmcoj4cth2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhlals3f3hiol04fobd169cpst0r8uo2s8itc9do_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clgmcoj4cth2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmhqv3q93umg6932uldmjs3d93168otddabu1i5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clgmcoj4cth2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvrdn08pjjuffj0siq64dsocuftbu4fmdo69v3ko_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clgmcoj4cth2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlm2up1gqp7q8oj4nk8v3r01tj13fu894fu9gsmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clgmcoj4cth2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqkflq1p9h956uhtkgiuhv1v4e3cem5b2nhrfrao_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clgmcoj4cth2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: stop the GOP default crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Last week, Republicans brought us to the brink of a catastrophic government shutdown.
#
Team,
Last week, Republicans brought us to the brink of a catastrophic government shutdown
Thankfully, the Senate was able to keep our government open through December. But without urgent action and bipartisan support, we’re still at risk of defaulting on our national debt this month -- because Mitch McConnell and Republicans in Washington want to jeopardize the full faith and credit of the United States for a political stunt.
Defaulting on our debt could destroy millions of jobs, put Social Security benefits for our seniors at risk, and wreck America’s economy. You can count on me to keep working to ensure that we fulfill our nation’s financial obligations and avoid the economic disaster a debt ceiling crisis would cause for Nevada’s families.

In the Senate, we should be working to help families and small businesses bounce back from this pandemic. Instead, Republicans are playing a game of political chicken with our economy.
**[It's time for Congress to come together and focus on recovering our economy -- not wrecking it. Add your name to oppose the GOP default crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37140917/310193174/875802446?ms=jr_em_nd_211006_1&refcode=jr_em_nd_211006_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzgzMWU0ZS1kMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRDj6BiI4k_sZQ7_2cp3KLWEe1JSFoMVD5ceuxyVmWg=&emci=bb53d761-bd26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=73831e4e-d126-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=3800590)**

clean_body: Last week, Republicans brought us to the brink of a catastrophic government shutdown. Team, Last week, Republicans brought us to the brink of a catastrophic government shutdown Thankfully, the Senate was able to keep our government open through December. But without urgent action and bipartisan support, we’re still at risk of defaulting on our national debt this month -- because Mitch McConnell and Republicans in Washington want to jeopardize the full faith and credit of the United States for a political stunt. Defaulting on our debt could destroy millions of jobs, put Social Security benefits for our seniors at risk, and wreck America’s economy. You can count on me to keep working to ensure that we fulfill our nation’s financial obligations and avoid the economic disaster a debt ceiling crisis would cause for Nevada’s families. In the Senate, we should be working to help families and small businesses bounce back from this pandemic. Instead, Republicans are playing a game of political chicken with our economy. Thank you, Jacky

name: Max Steiner
subject: My thoughts on Biden's Build Back Better Act.
body:
Trump's giveaway to the ultra-wealthy that increased national debt by $1.9 trillion. Biden's agenda increases the national debt by $0. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37141881/310195789/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWVlYTJiOC1kNDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtKaVl7CCwxd6Rg1UySEyD3jL-whmn7URRmrEhY95Ug=)
I’ll be direct, friend.

A lot of political "experts" have given me a lot of conventional advice about this race. They've told me to only talk about certain issues, and stay away from others.

What they don't realize is that I'm not a conventional politician. If something's on my mind, I'm going to say it. This isn't about what will "play well" politically, this is about serving those who have been ignored by Doug LaMalfa and politicians like him.

So I want to cut through the noise and tell you about where I stand on Biden's Build Back Better Agenda and the debt ceiling debate. Here are two important points to note: 1\. The debt ceiling debate is about paying for spending that _already happened_ under Trump's administration, specifically **Trump's giveaway to the ultra-wealthy that increased national debt by $1.9 trillion.**

2\. President Biden's Build Back Better Agenda would make the child tax credit permanent, institute universal pre-K and tuition free community college, increase healthcare access and affordability, and work to solve our climate crisis all at the same time. **Biden's agenda increases the national debt by $0.** **Republicans are stopping Democrats from increasing the debt ceiling, and jeopardizing six million jobs and $15 trillion in household wealth along the way, just to score some cheap political points. Plain and simple.**

We cannot allow this type of Republican hypocrisy to undermine our ability to make progress. This isn't about election cycle political points, this is about fighting for working families, and that's what we need to do:

body:
Our police need us!
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sIXXZRNUrv8d4B1LOsEqrNIYie2xxfd7QfDBc1697fE-Q6SyYpuiHM2ECdoYdzVAws4K1qIxcKsa_mTa8lSSNEcvOVLemV21phaxTot9vjm1noSPxH4HfmXXHGlQChcLlz6FNuL1kzQi8Ihrkp0KnBBfjFgm-Qv4d9Dnd9NjWisLuz93PhFbkE_n92MqXXi7SDLcjtxwaGS5Q62AugLPZ0F_CFsrjUhTa01Zvph37SuO3_jT77fZp84sjc-clrU336AeiLINP98=&c=n4pWMXIpB4lR9C9yVzsAbze89A8XVDW2UlJMon0o2x1Xu8p833mofw==&ch=CV2UatLZcIRbjSN3Jqbw2HicyIh4y8968TdgAXUpeERqOIpZqN-6xw==)

| Dear Friend,
---
| Did you know murder is up 30% since last year, friend?
Criminals feel they have free range to do whatever they want since our current Democrat politicians like Patty Murray, continue to preach an anti-police agenda.
IT'S TIME TO DEFEND, NOT DEFUND OUR POLICE
It is so hypocritical of the democrats to walk around with their private security and ask us to not support the police. We have a right to protect ourselves.
Last year alone we saw a massive spike of crime in Washington - a 47% jump in murders, 100% rise in manslaughter, even fraud was up by 66%! I think the statistics make it obvious -- we NEED our police.
Join me in supporting our men and women in law enforcement.
⬇️Please make a donation towards my Pro-Police campaign.⬇️
---

name: Ken Russell
subject: RE: women’s reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida
body:
This past Saturday, we witnessed Americans across the country take to the streets in massive numbers.

|
---

| | | **500 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT:

Republicans in Florida are attempting to enact their own Texas-style abortion law in our state.

HURRY, Peter: Will you add your name to DEMAND Republicans keep their hands off women’s reproductive care?**
| [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37142844/310199713/950351286?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdjNmY5Yy1kNzI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNG_UyP3uCRg5AqMcRBSS0-Mo4Zy2zn8uDM0scYATrY=&emci=f4918004-c026-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=317c6f9c-d726-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22995843)
---

Peter, this is an issue that requires your immediate attention.

This past Saturday, we witnessed Americans across the country take to the streets in massive numbers.

**They were using their voice to protest against the Supreme Court’s disinterest in halting anti-abortion style laws, like those enacted in Texas.**

Make no mistake: This fight has never been more important, as Republicans in our own state of Florida are doing what they can to enact their own anti-abortion law.

**I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again, Peter -- politicians should, and MUST, keep their hands off of women’s reproductive healthcare.**

That’s why I stood in solidarity with these brave Americans in Manatee County, and why I plan to continue to show up whenever their rights are being attacked by Republicans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37142857/310199728/950351286?contactdata=DGRxZb8QTkB0YNqhaek9%2FrrvMS9rNEG2CB5dCQnLrjT4xLPWg9RPFTHpWiq2UqdEF%2FiroZdH5i1Dsiq%2Bz%2BGuwxngwJ%2BXgrXgX2uK3R9oJ5STbFnoDA0hPJ3aDN13yEpFcwkDqKyHSC2OGFVMHvwo%2FN98xZ3S0KCJ5AJ2%2BMwFGvu9R1HgQHGg9fFRoWdziHZQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdjNmY5Yy1kNzI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNG_UyP3uCRg5AqMcRBSS0-Mo4Zy2zn8uDM0scYATrY=&emci=f4918004-c026-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=317c6f9c-d726-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22995843)
Each time Republicans put forth these anti-abortion laws, our country gets closer and closer to the destruction of _Roe v. Wade_.

**I refuse to let that happen, Peter.**

I will fight tooth and nail for the rights of all Americans -- and I need to know you will too.
[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: WILL YOU SIGN YOUR NAME NEXT TO MINE TO DEMAND PROTECTION FOR WOMEN’S REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37142868/310199739/950351286?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdjNmY5Yy1kNzI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNG_UyP3uCRg5AqMcRBSS0-Mo4Zy2zn8uDM0scYATrY=&emci=f4918004-c026-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=317c6f9c-d726-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22995843)
---

In solidarity,

Ken

clean_body: This past Saturday, we witnessed Americans across the country take to the streets in massive numbers. | | | | 500 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Republicans in Florida are attempting to enact their own Texas-style abortion law in our state. HURRY, Peter: Will you add your name to DEMAND Republicans keep their hands off women’s reproductive care? | Peter, this is an issue that requires your immediate attention. This past Saturday, we witnessed Americans across the country take to the streets in massive numbers. They were using their voice to protest against the Supreme Court’s disinterest in halting anti-abortion style laws, like those enacted in Texas. Make no mistake: This fight has never been more important, as Republicans in our own state of Florida are doing what they can to enact their own anti-abortion law. I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again, Peter -- politicians should, and MUST, keep their hands off of women’s reproductive healthcare. That’s why I stood in solidarity with these brave Americans in Manatee County, and why I plan to continue to show up whenever their rights are being attacked by Republicans. Each time Republicans put forth these anti-abortion laws, our country gets closer and closer to the destruction of Roe v. Wade. I refuse to let that happen, Peter. I will fight tooth and nail for the rights of all Americans -- and I need to know you will too. In solidarity, Ken | Small business owner turned community organizer who became a Miami City Commissioner. Ken is running for U.S. Senate to clean up Washington of self-serving politicians like Marco Rubio and give his neighbors a voice in Congress. Email is the best way to stay up to date with Ken's campaign. _“Cheri Beasley is a barrier-breaking champion for the people of North Carolina. Throughout her life, she has fought for justice and stood up for what's right. As Chief Justice, she worked to make the courts fair and transparent. As a U.S. Senator, Cheri will fight on behalf of working families by protecting their freedom to vote and standing up to Washington dark money and corporate special interests. We're proud to endorse her campaign and are excited to help her continue to make history when she wins next November.”_

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Aadland for U.S. Senate News
body:
Read Erik's view on recent government edicts
---
| | | | | | Volume 11 | October 6, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| Anthony Fauci is the Grinch attempting to steal Christmas. And it might be good comedy if it wasn't so tragic. Fauci is doing more than trying to ruin Christmas, he has destroyed countless lives with his lies and duplicity, irrevocably harming our way of life. Recall that Fauci funded gain of function research at the Wuhan lab. He's been one of the masterminds behind this pandemic the entire time. Fauci is a criminal that must be brought to justice.
Last Sunday, Fauci said on national television that it's "too soon to tell" whether Americans should avoid gathering for Christmas. But apparently his words weren't based on science, because once there was pushback on his position, he claimed his words were taken out of context.
His ideas have nothing to do with public safety. It is simply control. If Fauci and the Biden administration were about public safety, then why are hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants allowed to come across the border without testing or proof of vaccination? The Democrats are using fear to control our actions, our associations, our financial circumstances, and our liberty.
Amid thousands of firings nationwide, new poll shows that majority of Americans do not think the unvaccinated should lose their jobs. The poll by Convention of States Action was released last Wednesday showed that 65% of surveyed voters do not believe Americans should lose their jobs if they object to taking the COVID-19 vaccine. Those surveyed include the vaccinated. This poll comes at a time when thousands of health care workers and state employees have now become jobless because they have refused the vaccine. And after a year of unemployment benefits with no real standards, these people, who are standing up for their rights of bodily integrity and choosing to be unvaccinated, will not be allowed to collect unemployment. This is not only unjust, but also criminal!
We have the unalienable right to bodily integrity--nobody can tell you what you can put in your body. When the government dictates what we put in our bodies, we have no freedom. This is Orwellian control. And if we do not stop the government's intrusion at the boundary of our skin, where does it stop?
The US Constitution does not grant us our rights, nor does the government. These rights are unalienable, granted by God. We grant the government it's power, not vice versa. The US Constitution was written to protect the people from the government itself.
I will stand against this government overreach by fighting for your right to protect your bodily integrity without threat of the consequences of losing your livelihood. Our economy, our lives, and our freedom depends on us taking our power back and reversing this tsunami of social control. Please join me today.

Erik
---
| | | [Visit Aadland for U.S. Senate website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sd_vCNu5UgDNL9p2GuMtIRS-6291d2fHVDfXjY7259MmJOWSRX0G1Kqu3_XCpcv_5AnfBjXhNwOERvRxMklLZawK6v8Cdo8f0bI2vcRyV06JYw7qa0RkP1zIlKFwhfGK9TrDND7XqrkMwqj_fFcyX-AWXIGI-OVr&c=zcX8JgdybdGJ30potEqoNM9oZ_tde4iIAIEskcPGNvfqwAduSwP9-g==&ch=t7OpeGcNmyuydK-QXMUpzsPglvVfX6dZRY4PVCnCy4w4p_S4kf1BJw==)
---
| | |
---
| Upcoming Events
---
| |
---|---
|
* Thursday Oct 7, Erik will be on The Peter Boyles radio show on KNUS. Tune in at 7:00am

* Friday Oct 8, Chaffee County Patriots monthly meeting. St Rose of Lima Catholic Church, 118 S. Gunnison Ave in Buena Vista. 6:00pm - 8:00pm

* Sunday Oct 9, Colorado Hispanic Republicans Picnic. Fountain Creek Regional Park - 2010 Duckwood Rd Fountain CO. Picnic from 1:45 to 4:45pm

* Monday Oct 11 Jeffco Republican Men's Club brunch. Cafe Del Sol, 608 Garrison St Lakewood CO. Meeting begins at 11:30am. $5 admission

* Tuesday Oct 12 Alamosa GOP Meeting. Juanito's 2069 1st Street Alamosa CO. Begins at 5:30

* Wednesday Oct 13 Park County Republican Central Committee. Fairplay barn at the County Fairground. Meeting from 6:30-8:30pm

| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
On Saturday, I spoke with about 500 Coloradans at the La Plata County Republican Party's Lincoln Day Dinner. I was thrilled by the response from these concerned citizens about the issues facing our country right now.

Additionally, KNUS last week held a Cigar Night with Dennis Prager, who spoke about vaccine mandates, and the essential qualities for human happiness.
As a student of depth psychology, I was thrilled to hear Dennis discuss meaning as the essential quality for human fulfillment. I recommend everyone read Viktor Frankl's "Man's Search for Meaning.

This week, I will be chatting on Thursday with Peter Boyles on KNUS, and at the Chaffee County Patriots meeting on Friday. On Sunday, I'll be at the Colorado Hispanic Republicans picnic in Fountain.

I hope to see you at one of these places, or somewhere else on the campaign trail.

| |
---
| Come meet Erik in person
---
|
---
| Erik's next appearances
---
Friday Oct 8, Erik will speak in person at the Chaffee County Patriots monthly meeting. Meeting begins at 6:30pm and runs till 8:00 Location: St Rose of Lima Catholic Church, 118 S. Gunnison Ave Buena Vista CO
Sunday Oct 9, Erik will speak at The Colorado Hispanic Republicans Picnic. The picnic begins at 1:45pm and last until 4:45pm Fountain Creek Regional Park - 2010 Duckwood Rd Fountain CO.
Monday Oct 11, Erik will speak to the Jefferson County Republican Men's Club at Cafe Del Sol in Lakewood. Cafe Del Sol is at 608 Garrison St, meeting begins at 11:30. There is a $5 admission fee for this event.
Tuesday Oct 12, Erik will speak to the Alamosa GOP meeting, held at Juanito's, 2069 First St in Alamosa CO. From 5:00pm to 7:30pm
Wednesday Oct 13, Erik will speak to the Park County Republican Central Committee in the Fairplay Barn at the Fairplay County Fairground. The event begins at 6:30pm and runs for two hours.

| | Friends,

Our campaign continues to grow support and momentum!

Laura and I are _**ALL IN**_ to fight to give the community we love a voice, and stop the reckless policies we are seeing come out of Washington, D.C.

**[WATCH](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=b5480fabf1&e=659fba240e)** below to see why I’m so passionate about this campaign to represent Southern Arizona and flip the U.S. House. [](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=b3ddf8878d&e=659fba240e) I’m living the American Dream.

I am running for the future of my children and yours.

>From Critical Race Theory to the Biden Border Crisis, **we need to put the breaks on the Biden-Harris-Pelosi agenda**.

_Together_ , we can get this done! Juan

P.S. **Laura and I are so grateful for all the support** you’ve given us to get this effort going. But the national Democrats will be coming after us in full force. They know what we know – _who wins this district will determine who controls Congress_. **Will you help us prepare for their attacks and make Nany Pelosi an ex-Speaker?[Join us and help us tell our story](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=aa7930ba55&e=659fba240e). **

subject: Big news (redistricting)
body:
Our challenge is making sure we reach new, undecided, and irregular voters before Kevin McCarthy does. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37143812/310202717/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWU0OTY0Mi1kYTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiQLPWnn-OXbgofo3B8eVUrgg1B_rXmYjX2YEW1ScMk=)
Big news, friend.

According to the 2020 Census, California's 23rd District -- where veteran teacher Marisa Wood is facing off against Kevin McCarthy -- grew by more than 10%.

With redistricting well underway, we don't know exactly how much more competitive CA-23 will become, but we do know our district lines will change, bringing thousands of new voters into the fold.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37143813/310202718/-787496292?refcode=em-10621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWU0OTY0Mi1kYTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiQLPWnn-OXbgofo3B8eVUrgg1B_rXmYjX2YEW1ScMk=)
**This is a huge opportunity.** Not just because we might be looking at a more competitive district, but because it's the first time California will mail every registered voter a ballot. Our challenge is reaching those new, undecided, and irregular voters before McCarthy does.

**We have one main advantage.** McCarthy's taken a TON of votes that are out of tune with the needs of our community. He's pledged to stop Biden's Build Back Better Act over "his dead body," he's joked about hitting Nancy Pelosi, and he recently threatened companies that release GOP phone records to investigators. _The list goes on and on._

**Marisa is fighting for issues that actually matter to the Central Valley.** The choice will be clear, we need to make sure voters are well-informed about McCarthy's record and what Marisa has to offer, which takes time and resources. That's why we're asking:

**[Will you chip in $3 today to help us lay the groundwork for our ambitious voter contact effort? It's simple: The more we raise, the more voters we reach and we're coming up $5,191 short of our daily goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37143814/310202719/-787496292?refcode=em-10621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWU0OTY0Mi1kYTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiQLPWnn-OXbgofo3B8eVUrgg1B_rXmYjX2YEW1ScMk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37143815/310202720/-787496292?refcode=em-10621-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWU0OTY0Mi1kYTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uiQLPWnn-OXbgofo3B8eVUrgg1B_rXmYjX2YEW1ScMk=)

name: Your Response Requested (via DCCC)
subject: you watch Fox News?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you take our cable news survey before midnight tonight? | | | _**BREAKING: Fox News tops Cable News rankings (****AGAIN!!****)**_

---
| ****_**YOUR URGENT RESPONSE REQUESTED:**_**

**We're in disbelief: _We just learned that Fox News is the most watched cable news channel so far this year!!_

Fox and its anchors will stop at nothing to attack our Democrats and spread Trump's dangerous lies to its massive audience.

So Democratic HQ is conducting a major poll to determine which outlets our best supporters are tuning into.

**Will you take our one-minute cable news survey before midnight tonight?**
****
---
[Which Cable News Channel do you watch? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

** Response requested by **10/06/2021****at 11:59pm ****

We're deeply concerned.

We just learned that Fox News is the **MOST VIEWED** cable news channel so far this year.

**We 're horrified:****Fox 's far-right anchors are DEAD SET on attacking our Democrats and spreading dangerous, deadly lies about everything from vaccines to our elections.**

That's why Democratic HQ is conducting a MAJOR poll to determine which news outlets our supporters are tuning into.

As Republicans attack our Democrats with lies and conspiracy theories, _the truth matters more than ever before._

So we're calling on 10,000 grassroots Democrats to take our one-minute poll before midnight and let us know who they trust with the truth.

******Will you take our one-minute cable news survey before midnight tonight?** | [LET US KNOW: Which Cable News Channel do you watch? >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et6gKjLc_)
---

Thanks,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. subject: This just makes sense, Peter

Roy has been fighting for this for YEARS. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37144264/310204536/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmRiNjhjYi1kYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efJwQNncyHybN6XngLuZG9ikyGPzEfL9VaKC954TiXU=&emci=046a18db-cb26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=66db68cb-db26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Here at Team Cooper HQ, we believe it’s _way_ past time to expand Medicaid in North Carolina. Roy’s spent _years_ fighting the GOP’s partisan gridlock to expand Medicaid and make health care accessible to more than 500,000 of our neighbors who need it, but he can’t do it alone. **[Donate $25 or whatever you can right now to help Roy keep up the fight for quality, affordable health care coverage by supporting North Carolina Democrats>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37144266/310204540/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_medicaidfr_100621_L1_b&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmRiNjhjYi1kYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efJwQNncyHybN6XngLuZG9ikyGPzEfL9VaKC954TiXU=)** Peter, during the most severe public health crisis in a century, there should be nothing _less_ controversial than ensuring that everyone is able to receive the care they need to stay healthy — without breaking the bank. Far too many North Carolinians are having to choose between visiting the doctor and paying the rent. And here’s the thing: _We know exactly how to solve this problem._ In states that have already expanded Medicaid, groups of at-risk people who benefit from Medicaid saw mortality rates decline. Meanwhile, expanding Medicaid can actually _spur economic growth_ — and has even saved some states money overall. **Expanding Medicaid just makes sense.** **[Show Roy that you’re in the fight for Medicaid expansion by chipping in $25 or whatever you can right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37144268/310204542/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_medicaidfr_100621_L2_b&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmRiNjhjYi1kYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efJwQNncyHybN6XngLuZG9ikyGPzEfL9VaKC954TiXU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $10>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37144271/310204543/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_medicaidfr_100621_express10_b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmRiNjhjYi1kYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efJwQNncyHybN6XngLuZG9ikyGPzEfL9VaKC954TiXU=)**

Hey Peter, it's Harold. I’ve got some bad news.

**On Monday, our campaign lost out on****nearly a full day****of digital fundraising. **

I know what you’re thinking. _How bad could losing ONE DAY of fundraising really be?_

Bad. Really bad.

As you know, ours is one of the top 5 races in the country. It’s about a whole lot more than just winning an election or flipping a district in Georgia...

**Our race is about taking back the House and saving the future of America from radical Democrats. **

But to do that, we’ve got to activate conservatives across the nation. We’re doing that through our major digital outreach program...and the bulk of that is on Facebook.

**With Facebook down, we missed a day of raising money, running ads, and getting our message out to conservatives all over the country. **

In a race this big, that is a HUGE blow. Our finance team crunched the numbers, and it looks like the Facebook debacle cost us around $35,000.

**_Peter, will you_**[ _**_pitch in $15_**_](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=675d53b20ccd42f79884e8091026651c&_e=rVN4h--8x8T3nnf2qcARDgly8tjtKcncyP6AcFTWLQOlmsi0qjwtwDMzJ2iAngGaIz6nyQKFkaHcIrzgFyZj0CpupwE0QBz56IeZ1zVd8w4gjIYogcBIf0OKiicAIyL0Vz0Tt7JMqDUnzcKvzaKrzy24WTWQm7taFW3G-dpB_uB66yahM03_GevhGl0lX1qjoJGqGSCd7ou1YV0etElq-5S6ANmefvyH4IsqqRbQpzYkyfFyEgXKrc-Loq8n2iB1Om8kF3n7u5Nezj2nuJsxjZ43IAZ2RVRQja9OxWaBnnwrZIAFT2lB0FjMhE2IbKn4vI8rQG2vhwpHhoHFPN0sueL_OjQe0rDlN4ulyiNbzXqdvfsDdrk2Zs6ejjxwymfnRGzNrxYe5EtSO6dUzEEFVRizcPFQT8wlPG6IGrAF6saAiTJEKxwxR5avKFQkjaTc39AoFa2-B2-p-O8riCIr9Y9auawPAhjFp0z6HYDjaP74mOIP_hKLFJP-2h65vqkw)** _today and help us make up lost ground? _**
[**PITCH IN $15 NOW**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=675d53b20ccd42f79884e8091026651c&_e=rVN4h--8x8T3nnf2qcARDgly8tjtKcncyP6AcFTWLQOlmsi0qjwtwDMzJ2iAngGaIz6nyQKFkaHcIrzgFyZj0CpupwE0QBz56IeZ1zVd8w4gjIYogcBIf0OKiicAIyL0Vz0Tt7JMqDUnzcKvzaKrzy24WTWQm7taFW3G-dpB_uB66yahM03_GevhGl0lX1qjoJGqGSCd7ou1YV0etElq-5S6ANmefvyH4IsqqRbQpzYkyfFyEgXKrc-Loq8n2iB1Om8kF3n7u5Nezj2nuJsxjZ43IAZ2RVRQja9OxWaBnnw4iaA19MiN3LM4w4NZDVlXjXouGeJpnrrcaBCPCEXCz6vceKYtwSVfKKRmPjCkXUDlLAAR3F8Ydz8LKkT6O8o4dKQyirdIVAIlM_Z0xYRIyQIBGM3QvytgWPuRReXRBZdGODOd9FWMBzEQWmXu0ZqXXfkUOVqp1YaMIqB6pWqtW8fc_WKQWXlMlMBHiGFpd1q5k5hNhIY3P7mR7DSmY8aO)

Peter,

Biden and the Democrats want to force through the most wasteful spending plan we've ever seen.

The bill includes huge liberal wish-list items. It's got "green energy" handouts, higher taxes, social justice nonsense... _you name it - it's in there. Every socialist desire you can think of. _

_**[STOP THIS SOCIALIST PLAN >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58480237:6bj6cI2NT:m:1:3253819041:75FC4CB37B3855E6F1B8498CE82C792F:r)**_

And here's the worst part: **_The Biden Administration is insisting it's "FREE."_**

**It's $3.5 TRILLION! **There's no way America can afford this "free" plan.
[**SAY NO: $35 **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58480237:6bj6cI2NT:m:1:3253819041:75FC4CB37B3855E6F1B8498CE82C792F:r)
[**SAY NO: $50 **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58480237:6bj6cI2NT:m:1:3253819041:75FC4CB37B3855E6F1B8498CE82C792F:r)

[**SAY NO: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58480237:6bj6cI2NT:m:1:3253819041:75FC4CB37B3855E6F1B8498CE82C792F:r)
Peter, these blatant lies from the Biden administration are exactly the reason people hate politicians.

They are presenting $3.5 Trillion in spending as a "FREE" bill.

In what world is $3.5 TRILLION dollars FREE?

American families don't live like this. In the real world, we keep budgets, we prioritize spending, and we don't pretend real money is "free."

This exorbitant spending is not only out-of-touch. It's out-of-control. And it's leading America down a dangerous path towards socialism.

**Help me rein in this$3.5 trillion socialist disaster by chipping in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2982895/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58480237:6bj6cI2NT:m:1:3253819041:75FC4CB37B3855E6F1B8498CE82C792F:r)**

Thank you in advance.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

clean_body: | | Peter, Biden and the Democrats want to force through the most wasteful spending plan we've ever seen. The bill includes huge liberal wish-list items. It's got "green energy" handouts, higher taxes, social justice nonsense... you name it - it's in there. Every socialist desire you can think of. And here's the worst part: The Biden Administration is insisting it's "FREE." It's $3.5 TRILLION! There's no way America can afford this "free" plan. Peter, these blatant lies from the Biden administration are exactly the reason people hate politicians. They are presenting $3.5 Trillion in spending as a "FREE" bill. In what world is $3.5 TRILLION dollars FREE? American families don't live like this. In the real world, we keep budgets, we prioritize spending, and we don't pretend real money is "free." This exorbitant spending is not only out-of-touch. It's out-of-control. And it's leading America down a dangerous path towards socialism. Help me rein in this$3.5 trillion socialist disaster by chipping in now: Thank you in advance. He’s refused federal aid and even penalized schools that implement mask mandates. DeSantis is defunding our schools, hurting our teachers, and putting our children at risk. It’s time to break the system that has enabled dangerous leaders like him for decades. Thanks for standing up for what’s right. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Join me in supporting Terry McAuliffe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| Peter,

Early voting in Virginia has begun, and the race for governor is far too close. Election Day is less than a month away, and Virginia needs your help to stay blue.
---
| | **McAuliffe, Youngkin locked in tight race for Virginia governor**

_-Washington Post_
---
[_**Now, more than ever, Terry McAuliffe needs our support. Will you join me in supporting Terry by splitting a contribution to his campaign now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGZqvR9xQCwZos8NQlssT9fTZnpXW5fKCh1Xaf9-ktU=/Lg_oAhm4tsGDgQWfsx18E30zUkj3dbEtV3dcL2HvpsE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211006-1-EM&amount=25)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGZqvR9xQCwZos8NQlssT9fTZnpXW5fKCh1Xaf9-ktU=/Lg_oAhm4tsGDgQWfsx18E30zUkj3dbEtV3dcL2HvpsE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211006-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Terry has a record of achievement and proven leadership that makes him especially fit to serve Virginia as our next governor. He's the right candidate for this moment, and now, we have to do our part to ensure we elect him in November.

This race could come down to a razor-thin margin, so as many voters as possible must get to hear from Terry so they know the good he will do for our state. But to reach these voters, Terry's team needs the resources to run the strongest campaign possible.

[_**So please, will you split a contribution now to help Terry McAuliffe win this race for governor?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGZqvR9xQCwZos8NQlssT9fTZnpXW5fKCh1Xaf9-ktU=/Lg_oAhm4tsGDgQWfsx18E30zUkj3dbEtV3dcL2HvpsE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211006-1-EM&amount=25)

Thank you for doing your part at this critical time. Together, we can keep Virginia blue!

Sincerely,

Abigail Spanberger
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FGZqvR9xQCwZos8NQlssT9fTZnpXW5fKCh1Xaf9-ktU=/Lg_oAhm4tsGDgQWfsx18E30zUkj3dbEtV3dcL2HvpsE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211006-1-EM&amount=25)

This race could come down to a razor-thin margin, so as many voters as possible must get to hear from Terry so they know the good he will do for our state. But to reach these voters, Terry's team needs the resources to run the strongest campaign possible. | Thank you for doing your part at this critical time. Together, we can keep Virginia blue! Sincerely, Abigail Spanberger Here 's a photo of Terry and me before we set out to knock doors in Henrico a few weeks ago! | * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. Traveling the state, I hear so many reasons why Wisconsinites want new leadership in Washington. But for a lot of politicians, the concerns they learn about on the road go in one ear and out the other. That’s just not how I do things.

From the start, I’ve built my public service on listening as much as I talk and delivering real results for the people of our state. So I’ve been listening to folks across Wisconsin since the beginning of this journey -- going places Democrats don’t always go, having important conversations about what's going on in every community, and asking how I can help.

My top priority is to make sure we’re not leaving anyone behind as we build this campaign from the ground up, which is why I have been so focused on setting an agenda that’s actually tailored to our state.

Look, I know there aren’t always events near you, or the timing may not work out sometimes, but that’s why I send these brief surveys around. It’s important that I hear from you and get your feedback as we head into the final months of the year.

**[So, if you have a minute, fill in this quick survey to share your thoughts with me. I want to know what issues you’ve been thinking about lately and how I can help, and then let’s stand together in the fights ahead to get results.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37146673/310215144/-1419572481?ms=em21_211005_fsurv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em21_211005_fsurv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em21_211005_fsurv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211005_fsurv_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=jbILwmW0Y2xPxt5lQprcXKVCttDj35NbDlTRXWcmAWJuTLxwAZkHXZVTF4hUJmpz2jdHVMEw%2FIIFPUbaNEMHWTxdIIrf97ExqGRN1Xj1C6E9QMGZJjt6Zhex1IG04NOmSqfh5g32%2Fkv4akRJn6opdtLyOEGRNOLGKvnVsVPeCg4%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGM5NTIwZS1lMzI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y77hFVjwqeCIol1HME72PR5sDVYOSqThHXTsLU4bXG0=&emci=d8a8384c-bb26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=14c9520e-e326-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=18659593)**

I look forward to reading your response. Talk soon.

subject: Add your name: Indigenous Peoples’ Day should be a federal holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

Friends — Two years ago, New Mexico replaced Columbus Day with Indigenous Peoples’ Day — celebrating the strength, resilience, and contributions of Native communities. The Tribes and Pueblos in New Mexico led the way to reframe the narrative and make Indigenous Peoples’ Day a state holiday. It’s time for the whole country to celebrate it, too. The United States has a long history of violence against Native Americans and ignoring both their hardships and contributions. We have a lot of work ahead of us to repair the harm that has been done. But Congress has the opportunity to take an important step by **finally recognizing Indigenous Peoples’ Day as a federal holiday.** [**So, will you join Martin in calling for Congress to replace Columbus Day with Indigenous Peoples’ Day? Add your name now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37147378/310217386/1473335438?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWZhYzg5OS1lNTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lIhjZhM3Pp96Tcicaofhc85H-6X4YzD1YlgXrUi45c=&emci=d6f70b35-b926-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=69fac899-e526-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37147379/310217387/1473335438?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWZhYzg5OS1lNTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lIhjZhM3Pp96Tcicaofhc85H-6X4YzD1YlgXrUi45c=&emci=d6f70b35-b926-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=69fac899-e526-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=252045)

name: Patrick Leahy
subject: The time is now: Restore the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
We must honor Congressman John Lewis' legacy.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Friend, I'm proud to share with you that, yesterday, I introduced the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act on the Senate floor. It is long past time we restore the Voting Rights Act. And as legislatures across the country continue attacking our democracy with transparent efforts to suppress the rights of communities to vote, there's no time to waste. We must take action to protect the fundamental right of every American citizen. **[Will you add your name next to mine and urge the Senate to come together, pass this key legislation, and protect the very bedrock of our democracy?](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)** Congressman John Lewis was an icon and a dear friend. He marched -- and was beaten bloody in the streets -- demanding that African Americans be able to exercise their constitutional right to vote. His bravery and activism paved the way toward the bipartisan passage of the original Voting Rights Act in 1965. Just shy of half a century later, the Supreme Court ruled to weaken this landmark legislation in 2013. And, sure enough, bad actors in state legislatures across the country rushed in to make it harder for people, particularly people of color, to vote. We cannot allow this pernicious cycle of disenfranchisement to continue. **We must put a stop to these growing voter suppression efforts. We must honor Congressman John Lewis ' legacy. We must restore the Voting Rights Act.** To pass this crucial legislation, we'll need widespread support in the Senate. So from Vermont to Alaska, let's raise our voices together: **[Please add your name urging every senator to support this crucial legislation and protect our precious right to vote.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)** Thank you. Together, we can bend the arc of the universe toward justice and protect the right of each of us to vote. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/j~94s-DWj7Tb/NnlZOGN6N1VrOE9yVzA4L1RWaytQVFhoQjdBQ3YybkNqRG9vejBDMFVrZU5pU1dsMDBSWTNwUHpXNjViNTFJZDNQZitKeXdINFF0cGs0clFJM3lOSzJpTXlmWkVJL0NWUVE3c1QrNTgzMlE9S0/TXBJY3BVS2JXQUlYNHlHTFFUVk9oWTh1TWVGdEdmQTMxUFBZeWhvTTRqanAvbmQ0QTV4Uzl5TnNXYVNGWFRidUZHVDJRZkt1a1R5Uk5xK28yaDNYdTM2RGt3QzRjcThHS0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Critical Race Theory Report - Major Report from MCPP
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/fatcatreportemail-8125680?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|

| | | | | | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ea942de8e3&e=5703353baa)

---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f58cd25c2f&e=5703353baa)
---
| Friend, The Mississippi Center for Public Policy has just published a report on Critical Race Theory in our state. [**_Please get your own copy here._** ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=362d2617a9&e=5703353baa) Critical Race Theory is dangerous and divisive. A form of Marxism, Critical Race Theory teaches young people that America is divided between oppressors and the oppressed. Instead of class categories of bourgeoisie and proletariat, however, Critical Race Theory invokes identity categories of white and black.
**Critical Race Theory is an extreme ideology **that seeks to overthrow the existing economic and political order.
Despite assurances given by the education establishment that they are not promoting Critical Race Theory, our report presents compelling evidence that it _is_ being advanced in our state. Some of our findings are shocking. For example:
* **Several departments at public universities explicitly espouse Critical Race Theory.** One refers to the way that “systemic racism” perpetuates “white supremacy." Another teaches courses that explore “how whiteness is constructed” and looks at the relationship between white identity and “white nationalism, white supremacy, white privilege, and whiteness.”
* **The Mississippi Department of Education recommends teachers use professional development resources provided by organizations that clearly promote Critical Race Theory** , such as _the Zinn Education Project_ , which has called for the abolition of Christopher Columbus Day.

---
|
---
| To defeat this divisive ideology, we need:
* **A law to combat Critical Race Theory.**
* **To review the curriculum** , make changes to the Board of Education, and take action to ensure public universities teach students a range of ideas and differing viewpoints.
* **Donors to stop funding this divisive ideology**.

Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we are on the front line in the fight to defend liberty, limited government, and America’s Founding Ideals. Our report sets out practical steps to defeat Critical Race Theory.

I hope you will find this paper interesting and our policy recommendations reassuring.
---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

Ps. Critical Race Theorists don’t always admit to promoting such a divisive agenda. Our report shows how to spot the signs that this extreme ideology is being advanced.

View our previous policy paper being discussed on national media below.

---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5ed4033962&e=5703353baa)

clean_body: | | | | Stop The Radical Left Friend, Our Country has reached a tipping point. The radical left is transforming our Country into a socialist nightmare. Sadly, “Republicans” like Liz Cheney have not only sat back and watched it unfold, they have joined Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden in their quest to cover up their disastrous policies and corruption. President Trump Made America Great Again, and we need a Congress that will do the same. It is why President Trump endorsed our campaign! Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Liz Cheney are all part of the corrupt DC establishment. It is up to us to retire Speaker Pelosi and Liz Cheney and put a stop to Joe Biden's radical agenda. I can’t do this without you. Together, we will get our Country back on track. Together, we will put America First once again. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

Derek, I need your help to send a message. Because frankly, I’m about to lose my damn voice!

I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up -- okay, for outright shouting -- at my GOP colleagues on the House floor.

Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy, I’m never going to hold my tongue. But our campaign’s deadline is tomorrow night, and I need YOUR help to let the country know that I’m not standing on my own.

[**Our fundraising numbers need to show that I’ve got a grassroots army behind me ready to flip this Senate seat so that we can start getting big things done for the American people. So Derek, will you split a few bucks between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us reach our critical goal before the clock runs out?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xs1OLDt8rAZVRmt2WmpPjqEqzyj9Xbn8Xlxw95SJZ_ay2aAJ_ZA_Zz0TILO5Z54sKL4eXJo1ammLS9ahqgN022QSX1TDyjpVkFfO9cq4Vnv2_RBrZ2pZBXYqjQ_KawdQwxiX3DFGELNnJp-FhqYi88bdHxOiZk-z0ODNC_PJZQ_Qr057dDG9i_9mynjV1D8giA4zsyTHJUWuqSXYzGnRjVKKJFwADcIZN8HJABQkn0huL90M-3l7t9ajbsMsfha0EdjtawkGMHNLgV4sAQDY2KjEnYxscM9AjG_aT_LbsJVh43XXmxhWZsfrcp2pYL7Phw/3fx/6itsn46xQby_WcrhXl_1-w/h1/9EgbZ2C6hoN7gTDe-qnvmz3wXwD_QI_uPgl2YY3o9p0) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xs1OLDt8rAZVRmt2WmpPjqHreKskq-Q3vkUiASQSj9rFhyTsO_dzbSWSjqebtuF7KPrSBbWsy8h8qSwurY0vxHiOr5yv-UT4v0Z5l49_NYxklxQNKXlD4hcnT75EAsc6puJrdfV63NQspbbmV_X0cWACws-NwbaEA86L9C6gtimkTHEve0_g5stmUmsgzOpHfT6AiQn8xrkqmFPQP8YxI3ZCtT9eWjSsr8deWSvb3OLlpDAZV7rKTXDVN07YdBtgcI-5y8mMx1zbOTCDH9VQO9Szj-cC__150XJ6cpMM2dnVxUggeWGaPsg8GVn5DL9gYQ/3fx/6itsn46xQby_WcrhXl_1-w/h2/RbKkTyVJmghapjchmJi2P7LxPd6snOxJm8D7H1j9HAA)

body:
Literally. Here in Virginia, one-party rule has brought historic levels of homicide and violence... [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=a4731acaeaf04c10baa675b9fb27cde7&_e=8NGj1RSGEGHqmPMaRS4IgnQLOB31E3D7oL6FrwrW2wMovsUuC6eOGMzhWyuHk1vXKMeadkEX8jfWKxF2MMENTaqD5hm370DnYgA7CB_Q-eaoesgWwKua2ZyDliBIS9BlSK_UbIuhJZ5EwIs9iXkdGdFnjQ21qLLreI0X40cEdYvS7bXIANp8hwdmJfcFHLratjL2BxqThEr0AoW5Tk1H_kXaoVmZw_YpccJVY9G9f8q3f3Wd0PedS6patXYGgk0av3lhnfZcesDD2DGN6Ky4uUjnchJfrotTohZtd9xKZps0JAUlRkrUKGhmHvahwo-ny0Nxb73oZACgd3V5o3XnGVndlErmOcRid823aImzDhCm56bY99O_JFa03zr-4ra8zZI1MGLAAJSz69noUPgnNOu7D_viPU1XykKzmI_cAj2rHl5z0Yz8IuwCIGmbF_z5XQasfKaB7sbTFBFGKO07g2o9_68yrgcQQH97Na1VVHU%3D) | |

Friend,

It’s Jason Miyares here. I’m the son of an immigrant, a Virginia state delegate, and a former prosecutor, and I’m running for Attorney General in Virginia.

I’m running because I believe we need to end one-party Democratic rule in Richmond and in this country.

Across the United States, we’re seeing skyrocketing crime and homicide rates thanks to spineless liberal leadership. It’s no different here in Virginia.
[**Support my campaign to clean up our streets**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=a4731acaeaf04c10baa675b9fb27cde7&_e=8NGj1RSGEGHqmPMaRS4IgnQLOB31E3D7oL6FrwrW2wMovsUuC6eOGMzhWyuHk1vXKMeadkEX8jfWKxF2MMENTaqD5hm370DnYgA7CB_Q-eaoesgWwKua2ZyDliBIS9BlSK_UbIuhJZ5EwIs9iXkdGdFnjQ21qLLreI0X40cEdYvS7bXIANp8hwdmJfcFHLratjL2BxqThEr0AoW5Tk1H_kXaoVmZw_YpccJVY9G9f8q3f3Wd0PedS6patXYGgk0av3lhnfZcesDD2DGN6Ky4uVs5u3fLRTPKuXKy4UBnKXNxeUAacz7vW0ElSMB8X7W8u3LLc7LrB4uhernbEs_hb5Fj_G-spo9hdxnmSUk-HJIqOKvOAj-7GK8nA2AmJpTLyiRXHOF-SvY9fXvAfNIMho6g5Pr2MsrrJeqD1O_iY2eSX16QB2c89m0BTEId9K-nxKOXXo2S1PzXJbsMDAjbbBuds-8i7FFJsQsyqYfpCao%3D)
More and more in America, one party is controlling _everything._ What does that mean for you and your family?

**It means our communities aren’t safe.**[_**Watch me discuss this in my latest ad:**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=a4731acaeaf04c10baa675b9fb27cde7&_e=8NGj1RSGEGHqmPMaRS4IgnQLOB31E3D7oL6FrwrW2wMovsUuC6eOGMzhWyuHk1vXKMeadkEX8jfWKxF2MMENTaqD5hm370DnYgA7CB_Q-eaoesgWwKua2ZyDliBIS9BlSK_UbIuhJZ5EwIs9iXkdGdFnjQ21qLLreI0X40cEdYvS7bXIANp8hwdmJfcFHLratjL2BxqThEr0AoW5Tk1H_kXaoVmZw_YpccJVY9G9f8q3f3Wd0PedS6patXYGgk0av3lhnfZcesDD2DGN6Ky4uVtoL7WnZ9nqwgPDwvGZvCQOEagrKTKJBh0DBE-rSBqEHlc8EL9gp8FtQiZg_p2icPIguJo1zyjbdqlD8b4zqIPMYQCETRDSzi7nw9si0jaQ0LIDZkSxCvfRDsY3qlq0d1XkjSGT1hDkwNQvR4Q0ZvYdcrslz9zjNxmuN8SYbo7OflzJhOxxFx2M4sKEq5jSDqK2OpB8h7uatc-lq21P-I4%3D)
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=a4731acaeaf04c10baa675b9fb27cde7&_e=8NGj1RSGEGHqmPMaRS4IgnQLOB31E3D7oL6FrwrW2wMovsUuC6eOGMzhWyuHk1vXKMeadkEX8jfWKxF2MMENTaqD5hm370DnYgA7CB_Q-eaoesgWwKua2ZyDliBIS9BlSK_UbIuhJZ5EwIs9iXkdGdFnjQ21qLLreI0X40cEdYvS7bXIANp8hwdmJfcFHLratjL2BxqThEr0AoW5Tk1H_kXaoVmZw_YpccJVY9G9f8q3f3Wd0PedS6patXYGgk0av3lhnfZcesDD2DGN6Ky4uZgYh8xMmyvu4akV8cqIUl3Yg20jG0xiuJrwcWWo3zN8KUUJHQbit3j9LU5Fz9CuHY1YHGAXF1BATUDEF7JncOzJ6ve1AagB3IqZ_JJeIbpF-R3C5FUxuaILCsRWECy9mN0S4CwB7djr9kQt2pzK_Jdd7rgVbKt9ygFdu0QbbyYwC3prcQGUn3DplZhKaBetxtcrGG_x_QlZyqEZk79SevE%3D)

Here in Virginia, AG Mark Herring is **guilty** of releasing violent criminals early and putting our citizens at risk. Our homicide numbers are through the roof, and that’s unacceptable.

Friend, we see it all over this great country – the rule of law is no more – and we need to restore it.
[**SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN TO RESTORE LAW & ORDER TODAY**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=a4731acaeaf04c10baa675b9fb27cde7&_e=8NGj1RSGEGHqmPMaRS4IgnQLOB31E3D7oL6FrwrW2wMovsUuC6eOGMzhWyuHk1vXKMeadkEX8jfWKxF2MMENTaqD5hm370DnYgA7CB_Q-eaoesgWwKua2ZyDliBIS9BlSK_UbIuhJZ5EwIs9iXkdGdFnjQ21qLLreI0X40cEdYvS7bXIANp8hwdmJfcFHLratjL2BxqThEr0AoW5Tk1H_kXaoVmZw_YpccJVY9G9f8q3f3Wd0PedS6patXYGgk0av3lhnfZcesDD2DGN6Ky4uXnDUDk5nUiIA8jjARtdf-tjRxdBC00Ss4Z0fq-v7t-zs5lNq01FQXdzjTP7D4XRUnJj1kAGBtMQcwydixxpV9wUYr4zBdlAGO6xxyVLP4ZBnzHp0Tt66OvSrfm_IzNpjNn81_4NkVOw7ESzE3nrxh4y28yJapKE6izOJWthczWNod4MJjzGsoGEKvLHErdVztLLzFHBZccR9xXyPaLzTp4%3D)
Thanks for backing me in this race, friend. Virginia was once a safe state where people could live free. Now, it’s run by a left-wing political machine.

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8862%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=T6jlPDwcosG4I7eoasP7%2bA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15707%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9PUFHzOaQ8ZbhcIVTTHsHQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15708%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zTt5z3qko9URc9cyJzEckw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15708%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zTt5z3qko9URc9cyJzEckw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8862%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=T6jlPDwcosG4I7eoasP7%2bA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8862%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=T6jlPDwcosG4I7eoasP7%2bA&sysid=1)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Stop forced COVID vax on campus
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgn7j4ven5a4qcpku8e0ocvh768uokehtruvube8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clim2o32c3h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zs5aprki3ms5d5vohu6hc26s9oksuo5083f1thpg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clim2o32c3h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf48u9e144a43u0gidqmsnn3aa9f9bpg63d82f28_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clim2o32c3h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zk725eorokg46t3ef397neamm452487hpsjbicao_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clim2o32c3h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcm1dqtd9s25r4abfst23ahqbfr7q86lkc6iohuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clim2o32c3h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z85olal8977dqvv1nle648nu7nbuvkd5alaoiep0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6clim2o32c3h2bs) Thank you for your support! name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: *REMINDER* Freedom Rally Tonight and Tomorrow Night
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Tonight Is The Night!
---
| Don't forget! The Clark County event will be in the big white tent! My friends, Rick Green, a Constitution scholar and a fierce defender of liberty, and Rob McCoy, who has been stalwart in keeping his church, Godspeak Calvary Chapel, open during the lockdowns will be joining me.
I urge you to invite everyone you know and join us as we talk boldly about the issues, offer hope for the future, and chart a course that will steer this nation back to the safe harbor of liberty and away from the clutches of Marxism and Communism.
If you can't make it tonight, join Rick and me at the Mason Jar in Lewis County tomorrow at 6:30pm.
Bring your questions for the Q&A!!
See HeidiStJohnForCongress.com/Events for more details.

And what these dueling television advertisements show is the stakes of this race.

I’m highlighting my personal story — _a Virginia story through and through_ — while my opponent is using baseless attacks to rile her base.

I’m proud of where I came from. **I worked the night shift at a gas station to make ends meet while pregnant with my son, and now I’m running for Lt. Governor of Virginia to bring a diverse future for our whole Commonwealth.**

[**But I can’t fight back alone, Peter. | Peter,

If you have a moment, I’d love to update you on the work I’ve been doing in Congress for the folks of the greater Lehigh Valley and all Americans.

**I was proud to introduce legislation** to support the mental health of students on college campuses. Mental health support and suicide prevention are issues that are near and dear to my heart, and I am proud to play any role in promoting mental health care.

**I am excited to vote in favor** of the historic bipartisan infrastructure bill. I know that investments in our roads, bridges, broadband, and more will be transformative for families and workers in Pennsylvania and across the nation.

**I secured** federal contracts for local companies right here in the Lehigh Valley.

**I cast my vote** **to protect** reproductive health care in a piece of legislation that is especially crucial given the restrictive abortion law that recently went into effect in Texas.

But here’s the thing, Peter: **exciting and transformative updates like these are only possible with a Democratic majority in the House.** That’s why it’s so important that we keep the House blue in 2022 — and to do that, it’s imperative that we hold this seat. **[We're calling on our opponent Kim Reynolds to cancel her political stunt at the US-Mexico border. Tell her to stop wasting taxpayer dollars and put Iowans first.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37151006/310229223/1426795008?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2VlZDljMi1mMDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgFjqpzmZx7Uwcf41QgpNj0oI-xYZ_kcZs-O_fBBRFI=&emci=f02f4296-e426-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=a7eed9c2-f026-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=21044445)**

* * *

Friend,

**Governor Kim Reynolds is headed to the US-Mexico border for a political stunt to drum up support from her far-right base.**

Unfortunately, it's exactly what we've come to expect from her. Her administration already wasted $300,000 deploying Iowa State Patrol to the border, and she's publicly supporting a school board candidate who is part of a group sending death threats to local elected officials over COVID-19 precautions in schools. Take a look:
| **Iowa Starting Line** @IAStartingLine
---|---
| | | "We know where you live! We're going to stalk you! We're coming to your house!" The QAnon activist shouts at the Ankeny school board members as they leave the stage
---

It's gotten so bad that Attorney General Merrick Garland was forced to involve the FBI. He said in a recent memo that "these threats are not only illegal, they run counter to our nation’s core values."

We couldn't agree more -- this isn't the Iowa we know, and it doesn't have to be like this.

**Kim Reynolds is playing to her far-right base while Iowans suffer.** It's not time for our grassroots campaign to face off with her at the ballot box just yet, but we can still have an impact on this right now. That's why we're asking:

**[Will you call on Governor Reynolds to cancel her trip to the US-Mexico border? Iowans need a leader who puts them first, not someone who panders to the furthest right-wing of her party.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37151019/310229240/1426795008?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2VlZDljMi1mMDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgFjqpzmZx7Uwcf41QgpNj0oI-xYZ_kcZs-O_fBBRFI=&emci=f02f4296-e426-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=a7eed9c2-f026-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=21044445)**

| Friend,
Biden's tax hikes will destroy rural families here in Florida!
The Far-Left is at it again with their insane policies targeting working-class America. Biden and Nancy are on an uncontrollable spending spree. In a veiled attempt to protect their big liberal donors, they're footing the bill to the working-class.
Biden LIED when he claimed to not raise taxes on working-class Americans.
---
| | | [STOP BIDEN'S ATTACK ON WORKING FAMILIES](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010Rw5grpXeJpnUvcZcjU_85KttkfLkwm90pmGm01ZVg0pGt-AKcdPHeyAoo02Qw5G3VINybRgCE3btvgIObw2oitKEQRDDpPqdLWVMNyD-gRucnLmWqsW6og3sBd4CaHEknjNtKuHaVfHBKZEfnaLRsYpNdYgxQr36hwZ1ByMTCbtLqeS1AH6qnTUs9j8U9C4eb7QqOTFqSNsgujxvUvZvsDSFdKq6Rfg&c=SgP3h_kpWb0aZK02FOzl19AcRTMCYqW2GhgdaoLrDQDs8hDkZajySA==&ch=M4dWLKxIkBKiwiOGiGYCCN8pZ2TllCXF0_sxEdlVm8fDlYjRDp7lbQ==)

| Kat was a victim of big government intervention. Her family lost their small cattle ranch thanks to a failed Obama-era program and was left homeless. Since then, she has dedicated her life to fighting back against the Radical Left's agenda to break down working-class Americans.
President Biden is continuing the Obama-era tradition of crashing economies and stealing from rural America!
This goes beyond political conviction, this is personal for Kat. When she meets with her rural constituency, she sees the same men and women that built her community and raised her. Her firm belief in the American dream was instilled in her by rural America.
She will not stand by and let more Radical Leftist policies destroy her upbringing. We need you to help take back the House in 2022 and stop Biden's tax hikes from destroying working-class America!

name: Team Eugene
subject: It’s time for Pennsylvania to join its neighbors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:
body:
We can join 16 other states in making marijuana legal for safe, adult use. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37151642/310231005/-1129432161?refcode=EM_PET_211006weed_N_TE_90DA_7_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzFmNDI3NS1mMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dvc0EIfcpeAEIxx3AmjSA_7YlHq1F7T5j_XUHSmyMds=)
---
Friend, it’s time for Pennsylvania to join its neighbors. Just last week, Pennsylvania lawmakers kicked off the process to legalize adult-use marijuana in the Commonwealth. If the bill is successful, Pennsylvania will join 16 other states to legalize marijuana, including New York and New Jersey.

But we need more supporters to make it happen.

[**We’re looking for our top supporters to become citizen sponsors of our movement to bring legal adult-use marijuana to Pennsylvanians. Add your name to our petition today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37151643/310231006/-1989484443?refcode=EM_PET_211006weed_N_TE_90DA_7_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzFmNDI3NS1mMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dvc0EIfcpeAEIxx3AmjSA_7YlHq1F7T5j_XUHSmyMds=&emci=89c4935b-d426-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=f71f4275-f126-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=10203249)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37151644/310231007/-1989484443?refcode=EM_PET_211006weed_N_TE_90DA_7_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzFmNDI3NS1mMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dvc0EIfcpeAEIxx3AmjSA_7YlHq1F7T5j_XUHSmyMds=&emci=89c4935b-d426-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=f71f4275-f126-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=10203249)** We know that marijuana legalization works. Eugene was the first statewide elected official to support legalization back in 2018. As Auditor General, he released a special report showing the proven, tangible benefits to our economy and criminal justice system, including generating $581 million a year in new tax revenue and decreasing non-violent arrests and incarcerations, particularly amongst communities of color. House Bill 2050 goes even farther. It’ll work to ensure social equity is brought into the new market, focusing on building an industry that supports women-owned businesses and business owners of color.

[**This is our shot to build a new opportunity for Pennsylvania, but we need to ensure Harrisburg hears our voices. clean_body: We can join 16 other states in making marijuana legal for safe, adult use. | | = Friend, it’s time for Pennsylvania to join its neighbors. Just last week, Pennsylvania lawmakers kicked off the process to legalize adult-use marijuana in the Commonwealth. If the bill is successful, Pennsylvania will join 16 other states to legalize marijuana, including New York and New Jersey. But we need more supporters to make it happen. We know that marijuana legalization works. Eugene was the first statewide elected official to support legalization back in 2018. As Auditor General, he released a special report showing the proven, tangible benefits to our economy and criminal justice system, including generating $581 million a year in new tax revenue and decreasing non-violent arrests and incarcerations, particularly amongst communities of color. House Bill 2050 goes even farther. It’ll work to ensure social equity is brought into the new market, focusing on building an industry that supports women-owned businesses and business owners of color. Thank you, Team Eugene ** | | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. Will you pitch in any amount to help us elect a real leader to represent PA-10? = ** PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. ---
Fellow Conservative,

In response to the National School Board Association essentially calling conservative parents _“domestic terrorists,”_ **Attorney General Merrick Garland instructed the FBI to mobilize against parents that opposed critical race theory in schools.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=156023f3177a40b3a12f73262d0488e1&_e=mZ5rtURVMCjhpQo_HZiGyNpwBhf5YrmShbLjqBfantgxjoBg7XghddEZmdH995zhF7OfVZe8xiyt_ybRcHpaDKyTcarPTP_hRmBqHk66SGfaBhuYvG0H2ZwscVnpIlkDhKKZ9wNBz4caQGDVY0VpiD3OSvbcyOjJMxyPtrmOYQuHZ0ZOEAhQk92R5H-yyPfOSj1Kesq0OG1K5nctsDUFqiMGEUU2yxF9uQoCkfiEqCKTG-4jGqTfbkbV5O07Nebk-1l2_npG-LOk__ocU74i1UEothfmMvc3qKXccSqDDdzyezOC-N3Btza5F6YiWDRE-i7V_c5EPku9MF4zVS4Ke-wM7-f4wDxlDgPIZfJtfKI_q4HdFksf90dO7XJGHvyY)

**The Biden Administration is weaponizing the Department of Justice against American parents.**

They have made parents out to be the bad guy because they dared to stand up for their children and push back on these failing school boards.

According to the Department of Justice, you're the bad guy for standing up for your children.

You're the bad guy while schools teach your children hate and racism.

You're the bad guy because you want classroom time spent on math and writing, not critical race theory.

[**We need to do whatever we can to block the Left's agenda and keep them from reclassifying dissent as _"disinformation"_ and _"domestic terrorism."_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=156023f3177a40b3a12f73262d0488e1&_e=mZ5rtURVMCjhpQo_HZiGyNpwBhf5YrmShbLjqBfantgxjoBg7XghddEZmdH995zhF7OfVZe8xiyt_ybRcHpaDKyTcarPTP_hRmBqHk66SGfaBhuYvG0H2ZwscVnpIlkDhKKZ9wNBz4caQGDVY0VpiD3OSvbcyOjJMxyPtrmOYQtzQufSWlabkXd-F1ploTb1qKxKhdlBF0yxaCbQSOJpwGBPCA9UdDJftF0e3b7fJY_hOlfNe74eh95H3kkYv6yvf6P9CS00liTMTQZIAgOTRyRfsdS6XQKonHDVIklScX1oWzGc7QghD4bZoGfLK9Vkv3UnF8OO3WlTzloRWAExXoMkCiw8Kgch1Lv1N0vfyPXIKGDFss13jC1AWgaoLJu4)

Your government is being weaponized against you, and we need to take back the U.S. Senate to stop their progress. **I'm running to flip a Senate seat in Arizona, and we can't take back the Senate if we don't take back Arizona.**

[**Fellow Conservative, will you contribute $5 today to help me block the Biden Administrations' weaponization of the U.S. government?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=156023f3177a40b3a12f73262d0488e1&_e=mZ5rtURVMCjhpQo_HZiGyNpwBhf5YrmShbLjqBfantgxjoBg7XghddEZmdH995zhF7OfVZe8xiyt_ybRcHpaDKyTcarPTP_hRmBqHk66SGfaBhuYvG0H2ZwscVnpIlkDhKKZ9wNBz4caQGDVY0VpiD3OSvbcyOjJMxyPtrmOYQvV0Gg7U81huAT8M3PDH7Y1grJgjzFjGU5-KQ-s6Pp0XzfK319E9iZH15XrGTRXBkR4z1TxGuKqMvwholPAJqpoV1CLKzaDNGtt3STm2Z9PGXAV5b0cAV5Y1Ja9ofuX4LJEqKFYKSOBL208JiAtua1G4aj0JyK38_n4aBhkQKAGXu_aQS4eeV_l4CxdNNK1mtoEDwqwZWXoGhqzo94rmzfl)
