name: Team Christy
subject: Let's keep the fire burning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37151740/310231533/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGRmYmMyNS1mMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kU7YcZCSe-SPAov8Xaai7UzlNWgPyujG3nz6Irh4VwE=&emci=fcc573c5-dd26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=08dfbc25-f226-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

Can you feel that? We feel it too. That's the feeling of the wind at our backs. Because we've built something really special here on Team Christy.

We have the momentum to flip CA-25 blue, but it won't be easy. **Republicans only need to win 5 more seats to control the House, which means this district is going to be _key_ if we want to keep Democratic control of the House.**

We are already off to a great start. Our families, friends, and community stood strong and defeated the disastrous right-wing recall effort, despite Mike Garcia's best efforts to elect Larry Elder. That was a huge win -- one we accomplished _together_.

When we stand together, we can beat our opponents who would rather see our communities suffer during the pandemic. What we need right now are leaders who have the courage and strength to stand up to our opponents and their wealthy donors, and to do what's right for working families.

**Christy Smith is that leader. And with you on our team, we know that we are unstoppable.**

**[Peter, the far-right has been against progress in Congress for far too long. We're close to flipping this seat -- and right now, we have the momentum to win. Can you donate $5, $10, $15, or more to help us protect our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37151741/310231534/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211006_Momentum&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGRmYmMyNS1mMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kU7YcZCSe-SPAov8Xaai7UzlNWgPyujG3nz6Irh4VwE=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37151743/310231535/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211006_Momentum&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGRmYmMyNS1mMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kU7YcZCSe-SPAov8Xaai7UzlNWgPyujG3nz6Irh4VwE=) For too long, this district has had a representative that ignores our needs, doesn't listen to our voices, and doesn't vote in our interests. That's definitely not the type of leadership we need -- we need someone who will work across the aisle to find solutions to our country's biggest problems and _get things_ done.

**From protecting Medicare and Social Security to modernizing our infrastructure, reigniting small business, and making government work smarter, there's a lot of work to do -- and Christy will be a representative for _all_ corners of our community.**

**[We know we can flip this seat and protect the House but we won't be able to do it without you. Don't wait. Chip in $5, $10, $15, or more to help us protect our democracy now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37151744/310231537/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211006_Momentum&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGRmYmMyNS1mMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kU7YcZCSe-SPAov8Xaai7UzlNWgPyujG3nz6Irh4VwE=)**

Thank you for stepping up. Let's keep the momentum going.

\- Team Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37151745/310231538/-1056200607?refcode=em21_211006_Momentum&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGRmYmMyNS1mMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kU7YcZCSe-SPAov8Xaai7UzlNWgPyujG3nz6Irh4VwE=)

name: John Fetterman
subject: I tried to take some selfies on the trail this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It was a great week for our campaign, and here are some photos to prove it.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211006-2913-header&t=1&akid=2913%2E434096%2EfNpWeS)
Hi Peter — so much to report this week. Attempted selfies, the end of our third quarter of the campaign, and of course, a little bit of time on the road. 🚗💨
First up, Gisele + I had an insanely awesome time at the Pennsylvania Cannabis Festival. Picture it: Thousands of people from every walk of life, gathering in a deep 🔴 county who all agree it’s time for Legal Weed.
**Yesterday, we sent out a survey to you, our supporters, asking if you thought legal weed should be a priority for our campaign. Overwhelmingly, 84% of you agreed that it is a center-most issue to our fight.**
We agree. It’s time, Pennsylvania. It’s a plant. Not a crime.
**[Legal Weed is truly bipartisan. It’s all at once: A Farm Bill. A Criminal Justice Bill. A Good Jobs Bill. A Veterans Bill. A Revenue Bill. If you agree, I hope you’ll consider chipping in to our campaign to make legal weed a reality for PA + USA.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32590?refcode=em20211006-2913&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2913%2E434096%2EfNpWeS)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32590?refcode=em20211006-2913&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2913%2E434096%2EfNpWeS)
Back on the road at our second stop, Gisele and I had the honor of speaking at the Women’s March in Reading, PA. Our call to action? Mass mobilization — passing the Women’s Health Protection Act and standing up for abortion justice.
Make no mistake, the GOP dreams of turning PA into the next TX. My promise to you, as your LG + your next senator: I will fight tooth and and nail for the right to a safe, accessible, and affordable abortion. _Roe v. Wade_ and the right to an abortion is fundamental.
Now if only _someone_ would stop cropping me out of photos. 🙄
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32590?refcode=em20211006-2913&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2913%2E434096%2EfNpWeS)
It’s been a big week, Peter. As we move into the next quarter of this campaign, I am committed as ever to the values that our fight was founded on.
Voting rights. Abortion rights. A living wage. The PRO Act. Infrastructure + Universal Pre-K + Family Leave.
**[Flipping PA Blue is our best bet at keeping our majority + these Democratic priorities on the table. To keep us going for another week on the trail — can you help us out with your very first $5 to our campaign?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32590?refcode=em20211006-2913&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2913%2E434096%2EfNpWeS)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32590?refcode=em20211006-2913&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2913%2E434096%2EfNpWeS)**
Thanks for hanging in there with us. It’s a wild ride, but I’m heartened to have you here with us in the fight. Maybe we’ll even get a selfie together sometime.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32590?refcode=em20211006-2913&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=2913%2E434096%2EfNpWeS)
Onward,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211006-2913-footer&t=26&refcode2=2913_434096_fNpWeS&akid=2913%2E434096%2EfNpWeS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=27&akid=2913%2E434096%2EfNpWeS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2913%2E434096%2EfNpWeS)

Infrastructure + Universal Pre-K + Family Leave. Thanks for hanging in there with us. It’s a wild ride, but I’m heartened to have you here with us in the fight. Maybe we’ll even get a selfie together sometime. Onward, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

clean_body: This is going to be one of the toughest races in the country... | | 🚨🚨 BREAKING: Colorado’s 8th Congressional district was officially named a “toss-up” by Roll Call. | **= This is huge, Peter — Roll Call just rated our district a toss-up for 2022 and said it “will be among the seats that decide the majority in the House.” You read that right: winning this race is key to keeping control of the House. If we lose the House, Republicans will torpedo the Build Back Better agenda and erase all the progress we’ve made. Dr. Yadira can win this race. But we still have a big challenge ahead of us: we need to get this message out to voters across the district. And now that Republicans know how important this seat is, they’re going to be pouring resources into the district. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you, Team Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. But she can’t do it alone. = | = = Learn more at: Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

This crisis must end Fellow Conservative.

I’m talking about the _**Biden Border Crisis.**_

It’s a public health, humanitarian, and national security disaster - not to mention it could have easily been avoided.

Let me break it down for you, Fellow Conservative.
\- This past summer, over 200,000 illegal immigrants streamed into our country PER MONTH
\- Over 12,000 Haitian migrants have been _released_ into the United States
\- There has been a steady increase of fentanyl seizures and other dangerous and illegal drugs
\- The crisis shows no sign of slowing down under Biden’s leadership
Clearly the Biden Administration has zero intention of fixing this crisis, _that the Democrats open-border policies created._

Which is why I’m coming to you, Fellow Conservative. name: Josh Hawley
subject: Biden Deploys FBI To Silence Parents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
I'm Fighting Back [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e40a5f0842aa41059db5d81dcefd0477&_e=_8Vw1EMzl-JzKcMkHCaPyXcxU6-szFq2Fy0DBieZtLz63PFGKb3hN9cYSHwr2hObAIR057q9CnAGOiCLAsbyLyuLYniJhIj2XIAZ-4eDokef-XELrt-OwKGq9bALJHWeOi69wXykeYNMoL91vTnGTPxDNCmVUyeVgij65bttggflT2APAx-wbHb4NZhzTnAWTib3uDD04Y3QnDMeuFNCk54Rg5w3ZcXQW0MZaCCk3v_hr_lBspP3hhPPs9eHcEIfCe90y2-Cr5jTMGwgNJwKAn9IHskVRiKSkXIxaKUaCPh0bhUYg9AZixfitKbwLIimAj2i2M82Aeey33W_UnW4rg38Pp6Iv42lF8SnVQyGiQBr7dDcHB5xS3bEi-s-7u7Eb9Jyg3vMTTWskAxr1Vpr_kio4lhK9CL90xPnmlRkspw%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Public schools, which are funded with taxpayer money, and school boards, which are elected by taxpayers, are increasingly hostile to input and criticism from the very people they work for. _**Now, school boards are actively working to shut parents OUT to appease the leftist teacher's unions who push their woke politics and divisive Critical Race Theory on our children!**_

Over the last year-and-a-half, parents all across the country have woken up to the fact that public schools may not have their childrens' best interest in mind, and have been working to undermine a parent's role in the educational process.

I joined [_**Tucker Carlson**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e40a5f0842aa41059db5d81dcefd0477&_e=_8Vw1EMzl-JzKcMkHCaPyXcxU6-szFq2Fy0DBieZtLz63PFGKb3hN9cYSHwr2hObAIR057q9CnAGOiCLAsbyLyuLYniJhIj2XIAZ-4eDokef-XELrt-OwKGq9bALJHWeOi69wXykeYNMoL91vTnGTPxDNCmVUyeVgij65bttggflT2APAx-wbHb4NZhzTnAWdHvBMI-Tg05mYYYAMRUNd7UrT3DBSJAot9mpQpzGi-2xVlVJrFM6eGeBtBM2scjBDJGvoRuL53Fuhex3--na4HCUYL3ZYsYEdaT2H7iMQXImXBWxIL_qORIxDiS4dZmiTWsq_vPSDPzT_ccrF6fRrdkYI2jJVIyez1fAZC1Jpp_xSe6Mt64GayKMdcaJrEh5qYjlfOm49HrYbtNRGBzbR9PcWr0xZHznaA1dLZ9RrCM%3D) to talk about my efforts to fight for parents who are trying to hold teachers and school boards accountable!

[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e40a5f0842aa41059db5d81dcefd0477&_e=_8Vw1EMzl-JzKcMkHCaPyXcxU6-szFq2Fy0DBieZtLz63PFGKb3hN9cYSHwr2hObAIR057q9CnAGOiCLAsbyLyuLYniJhIj2XIAZ-4eDokef-XELrt-OwKGq9bALJHWeOi69wXykeYNMoL91vTnGTPxDNCmVUyeVgij65bttggflT2APAx-wbHb4NZhzTnAWdUDkpKgnZABm3WBXE-Aaoh5UiIOkYyNP_WLdtPlY8g8bxzY3cd0WzykMpT-wWgBa-fqH4CSBqiSvh-hKcNBayIWpMBmQj2EiBik6Itf9cPRHZ2wv_k7gas5QS79VU5KT7-vKmIOvQ59j5bD_w7dZGMoRj8HQh-36HDBp1SDtUE_nNP1dyYcdQT35iR4tnkxH2hCnwZL_ZMUF-TH8w-a5ydEARBu5CjJXCz0srKVktXw%3D)

Folks,

It’s official. The Q3 numbers are in and...

...we raised $2.5 million!

This number is a testament to our grassroots supporters like you and shows
we have what it takes to take on the GOP mega donors and flip this open
Senate seat blue.

Our numbers also show that our campaign is fueled by everyday people who
chip in what they can, when they can!

We’re proud to say that we’ve added 22,522 new online donors and that 97%
of donations were contributions under $100!

This grassroots team is made up of teachers, nurses, truck drivers, small
business owners, and every job in between.

It’s clear that we’re going to cut workers in on the deal with the support
of, well, workers!

Our coalition is broad and growing every single day. But folks, it’s not
time to take our foot off the gas. We still have a long way to go, and our
Republican opponents have deep pockets.

If we’re going to invest early in on-the-ground efforts and a
comprehensive rapid response program to counter the influx of BIG MONEY in
our race -- we need your help ASAP!

subject: Joe Biden is illegally occupying the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Dahm
body:
I am about to tell you the truth about the 2020 election that is being suppressed by the Establishment, the media, or Anti-Trumpers. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c479%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=REMx%2bu5syyhYiYWlPb1Vow&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66800%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aBHdEnIEt3jqV45I3vYHyw&sysid=1)

Friend,

I am about to tell you the truth about the 2020 election that is being suppressed by the Establishment, the media, or Anti-Trumpers.

**Joe Biden STOLE the election from President Donald J. Trump ... Biden is illegally occupying the White House and must be REMOVED from office and put behind bars. **

My name is Nathan Dahm, and I am running for United States Senate in Oklahoma against one of the leading Anti-Trump incumbent Senators.

I am asking for YOUR help to defeat this Anti-Trump RINO. When I am elected to the U.S. Senate I will demand a forensic audit of the 2020 election and support all efforts to put Joe Biden and his puppet masters behind bars. [**Please make an URGENT donation to my campaign today:**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66801%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BL8O88v7ROsGzghHG7OZRg&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66800%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aBHdEnIEt3jqV45I3vYHyw&sysid=1)

We must do everything in our power to remove Biden from office. Why?
* Biden is allowing **illegal foreigners to swarm across our southern border** (from Latin America, China, and even the Middle East)
* **Pelosi has seized control of our elections** with voter-fraud-by-mail schemes
* Democrats are **bankrupting** the United States
* **Biden armed and empowered the Taliban** to kill innocent men and women

**Let me make this simple:** I am running for the U.S. Senate to build the wall & secure our border, impeach Joe Biden, WIPE OUT voter fraud, and Make America FIRST again.

But I need your help to defeat my Anti-Trump RINO opponent. He betrayed President Trump and thinks Republican voters will not hold him accountable... WRONG!

Let’s show Anti-Trump RINOs what happens when they betray Donald Trump and the America-First movement.

Please help me raise $25,000 to reach more voters and REMOVE this Anti-Trump traitor!

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66800%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aBHdEnIEt3jqV45I3vYHyw&sysid=1)

I’m not the only one counting on your support, Friend.

The America-First movement, President Trump himself, and the entire country needs patriots like you to step up and take back our country from Joe Biden, the tyrant who is illegally occupying President Trump’s office in the White House.

[**Please take action today by making a donation to my campaign.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66802%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w9zfOOetUPx0JktMrPCp6g&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Nathan Dahm

name: Donna Imam
subject: Is the reconciliation bill popular?
body:
86% of Americans agree that the government should be able to negotiate lower drug prices for Medicare. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37154531/310238988/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmI5MmRkOS1mYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9QvPI51hKHz9TdmdJg2VlFQW7e-wU3IpfXjOgkrI9A=)
Team,

There's a lot going on in Washington DC, and I want to take this opportunity to cut through the noise to tell you what's in Biden's Build Back Better Act, and why it's a good thing for Texas. Let's take a look at what's actually in the bill: ✅ Universal pre-K
✅ Child tax credits
✅ Medicare Expansion
✅ Lower prescription drug prices
✅ Climate mitigation
✅ Paid leave
✅ Tuition-free community college On healthcare, the Build Back Better Act would help older Texans, especially those living on fixed incomes, by expanding Medicare coverage and lowering prescription drug prices.

Tuition-free community college is also a gamechanger for middle class families and young people wanting to prepare themselves for a changing economy that requires highly-skilled people in many areas of technology.

Child tax credits, universal pre-K, and paid leave serve as a lifeline to working Texas families.

**This agenda is popular and much needed.** 86% of Americans agree that the government should be able to negotiate lower drug prices for Medicare. Yet right now, Big Pharma is running paid advertisements right here in Austin spreading fear and misinformation about Medicare.

We must stand with working families against corporate interests. With your help, our campaign will take this message directly to voters here in Austin. Getting this message out is essential to fighting the GOP's misinformation campaign in Texas.

[**I'll be a champion for working families in the recently proposed Democratic-leaning congressional district in Austin. Chip in $3 today to help me get out the word about our campaign to more voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37154532/310238989/1898666321?refcode=em-10621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmI5MmRkOS1mYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9QvPI51hKHz9TdmdJg2VlFQW7e-wU3IpfXjOgkrI9A=)

This is our chance to send someone you can count on to fight for all of us in Congress.

Thanks in advance,

Donna

clean_body: 86% of Americans agree that the government should be able to negotiate lower drug prices for Medicare. | = Team, There's a lot going on in Washington DC, and I want to take this opportunity to cut through the noise to tell you what's in Biden's Build Back Better Act, and why it's a good thing for Texas. Let's take a look at what's actually in the bill: ✅ Universal pre-K ✅ Child tax credits ✅ Medicare Expansion ✅ Lower prescription drug prices ✅ Climate mitigation ✅ Paid leave ✅ Tuition-free community college On healthcare, the Build Back Better Act would help older Texans, especially those living on fixed incomes, by expanding Medicare coverage and lowering prescription drug prices. Tuition-free community college is also a gamechanger for middle class families and young people wanting to prepare themselves for a changing economy that requires highly-skilled people in many areas of technology. Child tax credits, universal pre-K, and paid leave serve as a lifeline to working Texas families. This agenda is popular and much needed. 86% of Americans agree that the government should be able to negotiate lower drug prices for Medicare. Yet right now, Big Pharma is running paid advertisements right here in Austin spreading fear and misinformation about Medicare. We must stand with working families against corporate interests. With your help, our campaign will take this message directly to voters here in Austin. Getting this message out is essential to fighting the GOP's misinformation campaign in Texas. = This is our chance to send someone you can count on to fight for all of us in Congress. Thanks in advance, Donna | = | = Donna Imam is a a computer engineer, former education non-profit president, and Democrat running for the new Democratic-leaning congressional district in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website here: Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Dems declaring war on parents in education
body:
Democrats have finally revealed their true motivates, beliefs, and twisted ideas when it comes to our education system.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LaA8kf6aqdV5XQnAecoLY0-NxWlo7h16AOCtdV3YEAvOJ41sSiyS-0yluDb6aK7jMtwwgUH9ON-7Zh9hdxHaNCcntTOCiuFVTYLVjwo4OtqotWCbG4-lCg3obiKATmtw351WPV_7cW4gVqnGOv202o5QVFGI6Bc64NaHc1pDOTiZJzoUvKqfMA==&c=RgAYbdzrLGNRGpvW-3mkMauk29xoL0AIFsE_WKSbYc1avuYrHVzSPw==&ch=LSg13ax_Hr8-YGrO7LvITdEq-cT3r2c9vFaZYa2vG4VfTUeyvQLuPw==)
---
| Peter,
Democrats have finally revealed their true motivates, beliefs, and twisted ideas when it comes to our education system.
Did you see the despicable statement made by Biden's Secretary of Education?
When asked, "should parents be the primary stakeholder in a child's education?", Secretary of Education Miguel Cardano refused to give parents that role. Instead, he credited educators with the title of primary stakeholder.
Even worse...
Terry McAuliffe, a Clinton crony and candidate for governor in Virginia recently stated: "I don't think parents should be telling schools what they should teach."
AND EVEN WORSE...
The FBI is now "monitoring" parents who attend school board meetings for suspicious activity and ideas.
You and I MUST remove Democrats and the federal government from controlling our classrooms.
When I am elected to the U.S. Senate, I will fight to end Critical Race Theory, remove Miguel Cardano from the Department of Education, and empower the role of parents in education.
Please take action today by making a donation to our campaign:

Friend,

Thousands of illegal immigrants are flooding into America through our WIDE OPEN Southern Border. What exactly IS Joe Biden doing in office other than making Americans unsafe and wasting our money?

It’s not often that we see $6 trillion written numerically – though doesn’t it make more of a statement than $6 trillion or $6T?

Our growing national debt is on course to bankrupt the country – and despite not having anything close to a mandate to pass legislation (read: an enactment of European style welfare) which would cost upwards of $6,000,000,000,000 – President Biden is doing everything we can to remake American society with bare minimum majorities.

Senior Democrats in Washington are completely fine piling on more debt to achieve their ambitious goals – they aren’t going to have to deal with the consequences!

You’ve refused to support much-needed COVID-19 relief. You’ve backed conspiratorial MAGA Republicans at every turn. And you’re delaying our important work in the Senate out of pure political malice. You’re willing to sell out our country to kowtow to the big corporations and your political donors. I actually care about saving --and improving \-- American lives. = | = Senator McConnell, you should be ashamed of yourself. You sat back as Donald Trump lied to the American people and watched, COMPLICIT, as hundreds of thousands died. I know you’re deep in Trump’s pocket. | | Hey Team, it’s Jesse, Quaye’s campaign manager. I’ll get straight to the point: **The support of this people-powered movement has been critical to creating a strong foundation for our campaign to defeat and unseat Trump ally, Mike Garcia, so I wanted to loop you in on our grassroots strategy for the new quarter:** | **_Grassroots Strategy Memo_** Team, we need your help in these key focus areas to flip CA-25 from Red to Blue:
1. **Introducing the voters to Quaye: Quaye took an oath to protect this country, its values, and the lives of the American people long ago. Our community deserves better than a Trump loyalist chasing headlines. With Glenn Youngkin hugging Trump so tightly in the Virginia governor’s race, you’d think Virginia voters would be all in behind Terry. But folks, this poll says the exact opposite. It says that Trumpism might still be alive and well in Virginia. That’s excellent news for Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump and bad news for the rest of us. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = If we can beat Donald Trump in Virginia, we can deal a death blow to Trumpism in America. Thanks, James =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: That’s a LOT of money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Big Pharma and their $15 million worth of corporate lobbying.
#
Peter,
Big Pharma, the Chamber of Commerce, and other corporate interests are doing everything they can to stop our Build Back Better Act. It’s why our fight continues — as some of the most powerful interests in the country increase their spending.
The U.S. Chamber of Commerce, one of the biggest opponents of President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda, has spent $30 MILLION on lobbying this year.
Big Pharma, another corporate interest trying to stop investments in working families, has spent $15 MILLION on lobbying efforts in 2021 alone. And the New York Times _just_ reported that Big Pharma is spending ANOTHER $1.5 million on ads supporting the few conservative Democrats opposing Build Back Better.
[**In the face of this massive corporate spending, we need to come together and show our progressive power. Can you chip in $3 to support my fight to hold the line and deliver economic relief for the people?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7562?refcode=em20211006-700&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=700%2E420207%2EQ19b4F)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7562?refcode=em20211006-700&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=700%2E420207%2EQ19b4F)**
I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs or lobbyists. Some of the lawmakers in Congress who take the most campaign contributions from Big Pharma and the fossil fuel industry make up the less than 5% of Democrats opposing the wildly popular Build Back Better Act. **This is obvious corporate influence in our politics.**
Look, the people elected Democrats so we could deliver for them. That means expanding Medicare, securing universal child care, pre-K, and community college, fighting climate change, and investing in affordable housing.
**This is a fight against the rich and powerful in America, and we need to keep up our work to deliver for the people.[So, Peter, can you make a donation today to stand with me in my fight to pass a Build Back Better Act with economic relief for the people and bold action to fight climate change? $3 or anything at all helps keep our fight strong.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7562?refcode=em20211006-700&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=700%2E420207%2EQ19b4F)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211006-700-footer&t=23&refcode2=700_420207_Q19b4F&akid=700%2E420207%2EQ19b4F)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
"God's Country"

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/leslierutledge.com/godscountry?e=624a44d946)

Peter,

Have you seen my new campaign ad “God’s Country?”

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F4T8tUtLx18

As a seventh-generation Arkansan who grew up on a cattle farm, married a row crop farmer, and mom to a 3-year-old baby girl, I will always defend all that God has given us. Throughout the last seven years as Attorney General, I’ve kept Planned Parenthood off the taxpayer’s dime and led the fight to protect our God-given freedoms like religious liberty and the Second Amendment. As Governor, I will use my experience to protect our Constitutional rights from the radical, woke Left, and I will fight to make Arkansas first to ensure our children will prosper and grow right here in God’s country.

Help us spread our new ad by going to our social media pages below to like and share it with your friends!
https://www.facebook.com/LeslieRutledgeforGovernor/

name: Giffords.org
subject: Congress won’t sign universal background checks into law unless they believe it’s a top priority
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The majority of Americans support universal background checks.
#

Friends,
The vast majority of Americans -- _consistently around 90%_ \-- want Congress to pass universal background checks. And right now, there is a bill in the Senate that will do just that if we can get them to bring it to the floor for a vote.
However, the Senate will only pass background checks if they believe the American people think it is a top priority.
[**That’s why we are asking all our supporters to take our short survey about background checks. Will you share your thoughts here? This is important and will help us put pressure on Congress to pass background checks.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/background_checks_survey?source=em211006-1-15&t=1&akid=1069%2E3935704%2E6aiOof)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/background_checks_survey?source=em211006-1-15&t=2&akid=1069%2E3935704%2E6aiOof)**
Your opinions about universal background checks are crucial. When you speak up, and so do thousands of others, we can use our collective voices to urge the Senate to act quickly.
We are doing everything we can to make sure that firearms stay out of the hands of the wrong people. Your feedback will really help us as we urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.
All our best,
The team at Giffords
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/background_checks_survey?source=em211006-1-15&t=3&akid=1069%2E3935704%2E6aiOof)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1069%2E3935704%2E6aiOof) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: The majority of Americans support universal background checks. Friends, The vast majority of Americans -- consistently around 90% \-- want Congress to pass universal background checks. And right now, there is a bill in the Senate that will do just that if we can get them to bring it to the floor for a vote. However, the Senate will only pass background checks if they believe the American people think it is a top priority. Your opinions about universal background checks are crucial. When you speak up, and so do thousands of others, we can use our collective voices to urge the Senate to act quickly. We are doing everything we can to make sure that firearms stay out of the hands of the wrong people. Your feedback will really help us as we urge the Senate to pass universal background checks. All our best, The team at Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

**$6,000,000,000,000**

Our growing national debt is on course to bankrupt the country – and despite not having anything close to a mandate to pass legislation (read: an enactment of European style welfare) which would cost upwards of $6,000,000,000,000 – President Biden is doing everything we can to remake American society with bare minimum majorities.

If Biden and Schumer get their way, they’ll be adding 6,000 billion - $6 trillion - to the national debt in the 9 months since taking control of Washington.

Fellow patriot, Biden and Schumer are going to jam these bills through. TAKE THEM SERIOUSLY.

clean_body: We’ve got to wake up to the crisis at hand. Democrats are emailing their supporters non-stop, and they’re raising massive amounts of cash to protect t | $6,000,000,000,000 It’s not often that we see $6 trillion written numerically – though doesn’t it make more of a statement than $6 trillion or $6T? Our growing national debt is on course to bankrupt the country – and despite not having anything close to a mandate to pass legislation (read: an enactment of European style welfare) which would cost upwards of $6,000,000,000,000 – President Biden is doing everything we can to remake American society with bare minimum majorities. Senior Democrats in Washington are completely fine piling on more debt to achieve their ambitious goals – they aren’t going to have to deal with the consequences! If Biden and Schumer get their way, they’ll be adding 6,000 billion - $6 trillion - to the national debt in the 9 months since taking control of Washington. Fellow patriot, Biden and Schumer are going to jam these bills through. TAKE THEM SERIOUSLY. We’re witnessing firsthand what happens when a man who has spent his entire career as a politician becomes president of the United States. We’ve got to wake up to the crisis at hand. Democrats are emailing their supporters non-stop, and they’re raising massive amounts of cash to protect their razor-thin Senate majority. We’re never going to stop asking you for help because our country is too darn important to give up when the going gets tough. You’ve been really hard to reach - and we’re hopeful that this email will finally get your attention. If Republicans fail to take back the Senate next November, receiving emails from us on a daily basis is going to be the least of your worries. Help us stop Senate Democrats from bankrupting the country. We’re counting on you. Senate Republicans If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! _I'm actually a pastor and my faith informs me that we care for the poor and heal the sick._

clean_body: Madison Cawthorn is the antithesis of my faith | = Earlier this week, my opponent Madison Cawthorn released an ad mobilizing his far-right base around promoting “Christian values.” I'm actually a pastor and my faith informs me that we care for the poor and heal the sick. But instead, Cawthorn promotes a gross agenda to slash funding for our vital social safety nets and healthcare. My faith does not condone Cawthorn’s cruel political agenda. And I will not sit back when far-right extremists like Cawthorn use faith to promote this distorted MAGA brand of politics. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = My faith deserves a better messenger, and our district needs an honest Democrat in office who respects the separation of church and state — one who will not tarnish faith in the halls of Congress, or his Congressional responsibilities in the name of faith. = 2,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PITCH IN NOW If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Yours in the fight, Eric Gash | | Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793 www.ericgash.com Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. He is running for Congress against MAGA Republican Rep. Madison Cawthorn. name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Unbought and unbossed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
The corporate-backed wing of the Democratic caucus has blocked progressive change for too long.
#
As you’re reading this email, Big Pharma and other corporate lobbyists are spending millions of dollars to influence corporate-backed Democrats and derail President Biden’s _Build Back Better Act_.
Enough is enough. The corporate-backed wing of the Democratic caucus has blocked progressive change for too long. **We must elect someone like Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate who is unbought and unbossed.**
Erica has made it crystal clear that she will proudly be the deciding YES vote to deliver the ENTIRE Democratic agenda and advance bold, transformative change for our communities.
And unlike her opponents, **Erica refuses to take a dime from corporate PACs, or Big Pharma and Big Oil executives** – which means she needs all the grassroots support she can get to flip North Carolina’s U.S. Senate seat blue in 2022.
[**Will you chip in your first $5 contribution to our campaign to help us win North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race? We need your support to get this done.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19712?refcode=em20211006-527&t=1&akid=527%2E3698%2EhI1M4b)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19712?refcode=em20211006-527&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=527%2E3698%2EhI1M4b)**
Thank you!
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211006-527-footer&t=21&refcode2=527_3698_hI1M4b&akid=527%2E3698%2EhI1M4b)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

body:

His weak leadership and disastrous anti-American foreign policy agenda has caused **THOUSANDS** of Americans to be stranded in Afghanistan with no hope of returning home. The President of the United States top priority should be the health and safety of the American people, but Joe Biden is clearly not up to the task. | | | October 6, 2021

## **Mike Carey Proudly Accepts Endorsement of FOP Capital City Lodge #9 Membership**
---
|
---
Mike Carey (left) pictured with Jeff Simpson, Executive Vice President of FOP Capital City Lodge #9
| Today Mike Carey proudly accepted the endorsement of the Fraternal Order of Police (FOP) Capital City Lodge #9 membership for the November 2 Special Election.

“I am honored to have the support of the men and women in blue who dedicate their lives to protecting the citizens of central Ohio,” Carey said. “In Congress I will work with law enforcement to ensure they have the tools, training, and resources they need to perform their duties and bring our communities together.”

See more in the letter below:
---
|
---
| ###

_The Capital City Lodge No. 9 is presently the fourth largest local lodge in the F.O.P. with more than 4,000 members and represents 29 law enforcement agencies throughout Franklin County._

|

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: Biden can't show up empty-handed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
25 days to go.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call_senators_cepp_clean_energy_credit/?utm_source=ema_2021-10-06_cepp_clean_energy_credit_inactives_&source=ema_2021-10-06_cepp_clean_energy_credit_inactives_&t=3&akid=12541%2E53494%2EWlFaxy) Friend, It's been a whirlwind couple of weeks on Capitol Hill. We have good news, bad news, and a critical call to action. **Progressives won big.** The Congressional Progressive Caucus and climate champions in Congress held the line and refused to pass the infrastructure bill without the climate-focused reconciliation package. Now, President Biden has publicly tied the fates of these bills together—in no small part thanks to the thousands of phone calls and letters from climate advocates like you over the past month. **But budget cuts are on the table.** Despite the incredible popularity of programs in the Build Back Better agenda, a few conservative Democrats are looking to cut back. That means some of our top priorities are at risk. **Here's what we need to do:** We have less than one month to ensure that strong climate legislation, including the Clean Electricity Performance Program and the clean energy tax credits, passes the House, passes the Senate, and lands on Biden's desk. [**_Will you call your senators today and demand these critical programs remain in the bill?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call_senators_cepp_clean_energy_credit/?utm_source=ema_2021-10-06_cepp_clean_energy_credit_inactives_&source=ema_2021-10-06_cepp_clean_energy_credit_inactives_&t=4&akid=12541%2E53494%2EWlFaxy) | [MAKE THE CALL](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call_senators_cepp_clean_energy_credit/?utm_source=ema_2021-10-06_cepp_clean_energy_credit_inactives_&source=ema_2021-10-06_cepp_clean_energy_credit_inactives_&t=5&akid=12541%2E53494%2EWlFaxy)
---
Let's be clear: We want the reconciliation package to be as big as possible. Every program under consideration would substantially improve life for all Americans, now and for decades to come. And better yet, polling from our friends at Data for Progress shows that it's super popular, with voters supporting the Build Back Better agenda by a margin of +32 points.
We need to stand up for the CEPP and the clean energy tax credits with everything we have. These initiatives will _directly_ reduce carbon pollution—they're absolutely essential for addressing the climate crisis.
Congress' new deadline for passing the reconciliation bill is October 31—the Glasgow global climate summit begins that day, and Biden knows he can't show up empty-handed. **That gives us 25 days to fight harder than ever for these crucial programs.** [**_This is our moment—will you call your senators today?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call_senators_cepp_clean_energy_credit/?utm_source=ema_2021-10-06_cepp_clean_energy_credit_inactives_&source=ema_2021-10-06_cepp_clean_energy_credit_inactives_&t=6&akid=12541%2E53494%2EWlFaxy)
Let's do this,
Lena Moffitt
Campaigns Director, Evergreen Action
[CALL NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call_senators_cepp_clean_energy_credit/?utm_source=ema_2021-10-06_cepp_clean_energy_credit_inactives_&source=ema_2021-10-06_cepp_clean_energy_credit_inactives_&t=7&akid=12541%2E53494%2EWlFaxy)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Democrats are in PANIC MODE.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The DSCC and Democrat establishment know they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning in Georgia. |
---
Peter,

The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all:

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e43c4cad9751401fbeadc936bc7ff359&_e=d4DWZFwSEjmviWx_RhRvShaGFnQXoolVjuR42Se2Tbjym36Mh9pwTbsMi62joI30VsCeAj7dIVxhpK0cgypmLuHyu3lDpFjl7dTXmUpB-qnvTzMSRzrlatrVo-ou6i7JmiPa54XvnbmQNHSPY0bmOHW_K-el2gEQaTavMqRIdvLYW8IcrKVRSoH1-lCcGTVKqv_a-uVXntjIzgCxS-kCCsGulVcfG6FgU24-vVxJhUOcf5iERihIftNbvviMkAGk_lQE6oqUDFQGZvyANqh_GhG_6SjxYOtdaSVnQcHy9BDEV0G8hvdh6j1ux1jB764SUJKqubolJBBf_4a7hkkzzZgyU8TeuM6XfhTqFu75Ic2pudhNZN4kxzU2FlcB-1EA5w9AII8YfhihKMxubiqbpQIUhnLHDcWlgXjKLH9TaezkQitHOkheVfirbf1cNLKy8rT7Hxmxff8zfG9Phbxy-fPPohewuX-KKDshjLNDgjw%3D)
The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are **a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate.**

Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic.

They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year.

We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country.

We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls.

And, of course, it all takes money to operate. **[So, today I'm asking you to make a donation of $5 or more. clean_body: The DSCC and Democrat establishment know they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning in Georgia. | Peter, The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all: The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate. Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic. They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year. We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country. We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls. And, of course, it all takes money to operate. Democrats are in panic mode. They didn't want me to get into this race because they know that with President Trump's support and the support of the good people in Georgia, we're going to flip this seat in one of the most hard-fought races in the country. Respectfully, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. Derek – After Texas Governor Greg Abbot signed the most extreme anti-abortion bill in the country into law, Republicans took notice. Their response? To follow his example. Glenn Youngkin has promised to go "on offense" to ban abortion in Virginia — and we should trust he'll do it.

_**That’s terrifying**_. Defending strongholds like Virginia this year is essential to winning everything from 2022 battleground states to keeping the White House and Senate in Democratic hands. This race sets the tone as Democrats’ first post-Trump challenge – if we lose here, Republicans will use this race as a template to win in battlegrounds nationwide.

[**_The Cook Political Report_ rates it a TOSS UP, so the GOP has a real chance of flipping this blue state RED if Democrats don’t fight back immediately. Derek – The GOP is doing everything they can to put Trump 2.0 in the Virginia governor’s office, and a poll just found GOP extremist Glenn Youngkin AHEAD of Terry McAuliffe among likely voters!

**We can’t let that happen, especially not when the future of _Roe v. Wade_ is hanging in the balance and Democratic governors remain our only firewall against attacks on reproductive rights.**

14 states and Washington, D.C. have laws on the book to protect abortion even if _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned. But in many states, Democratic governors are the ONLY firewall against extremist Trump Republicans who have declared war on reproductive rights. And if Roe is overturned, 11 states have laws that would be triggered to immediately ban all or nearly all abortions – and more Republican-led states would soon follow.

We don’t want Virginia to be one of them.

With the GOP attacking reproductive freedoms across the country, protecting and electing Democratic governors is more important than ever – especially in Democratic strongholds like Virginia. But Terry McAuliffe is being outraised and outspent, and **we’re STILL falling short of our $20,000 goal. We need to close the gap before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT!**
**[Derek, we’re counting on top Democrats like you to donate whatever you can immediately. clean_body: | | | | ABC News : Texas abortion law propels issue to forefront of Virginia gubernatorial campaign Derek – After Texas Governor Greg Abbot signed the most extreme anti-abortion bill in the country into law, Republicans took notice. Their response? To follow his example. Glenn Youngkin has promised to go "on offense" to ban abortion in Virginia — and we should trust he'll do it. That’s terrifying. Defending strongholds like Virginia this year is essential to winning everything from 2022 battleground states to keeping the White House and Senate in Democratic hands. This race sets the tone as Democrats’ first post-Trump challenge – if we lose here, Republicans will use this race as a template to win in battlegrounds nationwide. | Derek – The GOP is doing everything they can to put Trump 2.0 in the Virginia governor’s office, and a poll just found GOP extremist Glenn Youngkin AHEAD of Terry McAuliffe among likely voters! We can’t let that happen, especially not when the future of Roe v. Wade is hanging in the balance and Democratic governors remain our only firewall against attacks on reproductive rights. 14 states and Washington, D.C. have laws on the book to protect abortion even if Roe v. Wade is overturned. But in many states, Democratic governors are the ONLY firewall against extremist Trump Republicans who have declared war on reproductive rights. And if Roe is overturned, 11 states have laws that would be triggered to immediately ban all or nearly all abortions – and more Republican-led states would soon follow. We don’t want Virginia to be one of them. With the GOP attacking reproductive freedoms across the country, protecting and electing Democratic governors is more important than ever – especially in Democratic strongholds like Virginia. But Terry McAuliffe is being outraised and outspent, and we’re STILL falling short of our $20,000 goal. We need to close the gap before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

**$6,000,000,000,000**

It’s not often that we see $6 trillion written numerically – though doesn’t it make more of a statement than $6 trillion or $6T?

Our growing national debt is on course to bankrupt the country – and despite not having anything close to a mandate to pass legislation (read: an enactment of European style welfare) which would cost upwards of $6,000,000,000,000 – President Biden is doing everything we can to remake American society with bare minimum majorities.

If Biden and Schumer get their way, they’ll be adding 6,000 billion - $6 trillion - to the national debt in the 9 months since taking control of Washington.

Fellow patriot, Biden and Schumer are going to jam these bills through. TAKE THEM SERIOUSLY.

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Democrats' assault on public safety
body:
We need to elect leaders who will protect our communities

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_prevention_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- October is Crime Prevention Month. The Republican Party of Wisconsin is proud to support our law enforcement and first responders as they work to keep our communities safe. Democrats instead protect the “woke” mob, violent criminals, and the far-left fringe -- making Wisconsin families less safe. As a result, crime continues to rise in cities like Milwaukee and Madison following the [“most deadly year in history.”](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=CFjYEVqyZtS1iJlrJm_4rbT2WHhDItRrTpX6yJLmAluDK1jQI-tkuMQMKnuEceQ-ylOLptxhdkuxUe_NsDRN347HtIhbvAduF63_j-iSuL8NZ1WlLqwDxE8dXB3n6YD-WGMoJILoBgFI0rDyZsF7PQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_prevention_v3&n=2) Democrats in Wisconsin have turned a blind eye to public safety, instead fanning the flames of violence in cities like Kenosha while **Tony Evers, Mandela Barnes, and Josh Kaul’s inaction on crime rates in Milwaukee and Madison speaks volumes.** Meanwhile at the national level, Joe Biden has stood by silently as the surge of over one million illegal immigrants, many of them COVID-positive, flooded the southern border, causing spikes in crime and a threat to public safety. **Democrats have proven that protecting our families and our communities is not their priority, as they defend their angry leftist mob.** We need to elect Republicans who will reinstate public safety as a top priority, and will support and defend our law enforcement and first responders. **[Are you willing to chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to help us elect conservatives who will prioritize public safety?](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV_3BATXb0cTVTwEFTq8jNW_LTdlBClCG4QEd8-PqoZnc&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_prevention_v3&n=3)** **Wisconsin is less safe with Democrats like Tony Evers, Mandela Barnes, Josh Kaul, and Joe Biden in power. Friend, we need to send them packing to make our communities safer.** Thanks, Team WisGOP | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV_3BATXb0cTVTwEFTq8jNW_LTdlBClCG4QEd8-PqoZnc&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_prevention_v3&n=4 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV_3BATXb0cTVTwEFTq8jNW_LTdlBClCG4QEd8-PqoZnc&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_prevention_v3&n=4)
---
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_prevention_v3&n=5).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_prevention_v3&n=6) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_prevention_v3&n=7).

Meanwhile at the national level, Joe Biden has stood by silently as the surge of over one million illegal immigrants, many of them COVID-positive, flooded the southern border, causing spikes in crime and a threat to public safety. clean_body: Thank you for everything you’re doing. | Peter, It’s me: North Carolina Republican Party Chairman Michael Whatley. I’m so glad that I reached you. I want you to know that I’ve noticed how hard you’ve worked these past months to support our Republican Movement and make America great again. That’s why I’m excited to offer you a place in the exclusive Chairman’s Club. | Official CHAIRMAN’S CLUB INVITATION EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | The Chairman’s Club is an elite group of the most dedicated and generous Grassroots Republicans, Peter. That’s why I know you’d be the perfect addition! Unfortunately, I can only hold your spot until 11:59 PM TONIGHT. So please don’t delay in accepting your offer. Congratulations! And welcome! Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

I'm writing to make sure that you know just how thankful I am for your support.For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=d2eeac700ccd403bb2f3fc2637134da4&_t=R-TXB5gAmuNFAtv4l94Ij0tLX1_w3xq698N4CJii_twoV2GBJI-mX4Px070zTxVEGOCxk2vQ2ed0stegfYOFr0SD-H2JNoHzCImSlpyPpfjfC5AturKjQuAN5KZPh7w--YJKYBCjJGQ5AiBbMEh71GkIR_mwLSngHtrz4lnYSbo%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=d2eeac700ccd403bb2f3fc2637134da4&_e=lii889QHLoD-sjjsFqaP1ssHrKlFMqO-2-zN_f-r_JlqdLeb8EsPTVw2U3WBIW4a8Rj6hVI57hI0kJ0UZaPU4Q0vXnGNQiQu8XQD_bK64jzsVcl2-oyurhahPX43u9ZXhnbq85xOhL6L83OEGDaPeCFqPmokT1sprXrYjEL41D934n828zhnXe8foVfIHDe49pYe9RyaQytvsQbEN8eBSjChngAS2cX9o42STqle6C6d0mon_DvILv-kMDEfuwObacuhlRJJ8YHl32nxzlZDOVzTB4joEjNnQ1sdH27A-SN1zqeeKMtiIn8_v2AD8K1oMHJjS-oqYSEu_tLTq8rIOhXd_CpIjlX_IDh4KIUaU1YEx9E-svcvq5ZYYURuhCj541NyogQMu0E9qFU6LEyd91TVnhsFQREMiNWDktNAaRDwvmaplp080g1vgK_N9wBt2RkEHv9cqJLIkAG-bQnwNd6IHIPejY4OUloBqbnf0OUP5xduV9Kz_4b74ZsEzNkA)

Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to briefly reach out today to say thank you for your generosity in September.

Up until a few months ago, you’d never heard my name – and it’s likely we haven’t met in person, but I am humbled that you’ve made an investment in my campaign.

As a first-time political candidate, I’m still learning the ins and outs of running for Congress. It’s not an easy task – but it’s worth the time because our country is going down a path of no return and we’re running out of time to course correct.

I promise you that your investment in me won’t be wasted. Virginia’s 7th congressional district will be one of the most hotly contested races in the entire country next year, and It’s probably that the House majority will be decided by the victor in this race.

With sincere thanks,
John Castorani

Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

| [**MAKE A GIFT TODAY
HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=d2eeac700ccd403bb2f3fc2637134da4&_e=lii889QHLoD-sjjsFqaP1ssHrKlFMqO-2-zN_f-r_JlqdLeb8EsPTVw2U3WBIW4a8Rj6hVI57hI0kJ0UZaPU4Q0vXnGNQiQu8XQD_bK64jzsVcl2-oyurhahPX43u9ZXhnbq85xOhL6L83OEGDaPeCFqPmokT1sprXrYjEL41D934n828zhnXe8foVfIHDe49pYe9RyaQytvsQbEN8eBSjChngAS2cX9o42STqle6C6d0mon_DvILv-kMDEfuwObacuhlRJJ8YHl32nxzlZDOVzTB4joEjNnQ1sdH27A-SNyag_F2aY13ykmoiPTDjOv5qXTQlAT8ZK51qHg50qVXK5dU94SrFVgfonBooVV7XZ7pzacRoS1sx2RGDD3Erxu3QWZtXmx7VXnoIue1I1UYCKJP66YQY6T02WRn0liXWGh7WmGEB55j6ct-Zv_bR8ysDTSSutMEpEemb9JItpFvilwl57Jy4ElRZsHvlbprkZcO4FQvxsmRWvUwXhiLobU)

| | Check the calendar, Derek:

In four weeks, we will know the winner of the Virginia governor’s race.

When that time comes, **I don’t want _any_ regrets** — and I don’t think you want any regrets either.

I can’t imagine a worse feeling than wondering if we did enough to protect Virginia’s progress and stop Donald Trump from scoring a huge political win.

_**[But here’s the thing: you don’t have to wonder. You can step up, right now, and do your part by chipping in to my campaign. body:
This is an urgent wake-up call.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37159298/310272709/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTJhY2UwOS0xNzI3LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rXyQQb206GmmzWE-6VU9VV3IAMGLPe7Kinqe-WttQO4=)
---
**Peter -- We were absolutely mortified to hear about the massive oil spill in Orange County this past weekend.**

The consequences have been shockingly painful -- nearby wetland reserves were contaminated affecting potentially thousands of birds. Oiled birds and animals have washed ashore and if the spill isn’t cleared soon enough, more wildlife will die.

And we still won’t know the full effect for decades. Previous oil spills’ long-term detrimental effects on both animals and humans are still being studied.

**Peter, this is an urgent wake-up call. California and the rest of the United States must transition away from fossil fuels in order to stop the contamination of our environment, water, air, ecosystems, and our own health.** [**Will you sign our urgent petition demanding an immediate transition away from fossil fuels and towards clean renewable energy NOW? clean_body: This is an urgent wake-up call. | = Peter -- We were absolutely mortified to hear about the massive oil spill in Orange County this past weekend. The consequences have been shockingly painful -- nearby wetland reserves were contaminated affecting potentially thousands of birds. Oiled birds and animals have washed ashore and if the spill isn’t cleared soon enough, more wildlife will die. And we still won’t know the full effect for decades. Previous oil spills’ long-term detrimental effects on both animals and humans are still being studied. Peter, this is an urgent wake-up call. California and the rest of the United States must transition away from fossil fuels in order to stop the contamination of our environment, water, air, ecosystems, and our own health. **893 SUPPORTERS NEEDED | Thank you for standing up for our planet. \-- Team Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Fellow Conservative,

In response to the National School Board Association essentially calling conservative parents _“domestic terrorists,”_ **Attorney General Merrick Garland instructed the FBI to mobilize against parents that opposed critical race theory in schools.**

Can you help me with something, Derek?

We have a fundraising deadline coming up, and we’re at a real risk of missing our goal. It's critical that we build a strong foundation to show the strength of this campaign, but right now, we're still $10,000 behind.

With top Republicans laser-focused on my race, we can't afford to fall short of any goal. News outlets across the country are predicting that this race will be one of the most expensive Senate races in Granite State history – **Republicans have already spent over $2 million on false ads against me, and that's just the tip of the iceberg.**

Between now and November 2022, GOP interest groups and dark money super PACs will pump hundreds of millions of dollars into New Hampshire in an effort to unseat me and take back the Senate. In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, making it one of the closest races in history, and now some experts are calling my Senate seat the most vulnerable in the country.

**[That's why I’m humbly asking you for help. If we're going to defend our Senate majority, it will take a grassroots effort from people like you, Derek. Leaked reports are even claiming that she’ll finally retire if we win this race and flip the 5 seats needed to take back the majority. But what the Democrats continue to underestimate is the collective will and determination of patriots like YOU. body:
How many votes will we uncover there? |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d690795f4f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Trump-endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona and I am the proud patriot who led the vanguard in uncovering heinous crimes against America in the Maricopa Audit.

**But the media has lied about, manipulated, and hidden the data from the American Public. I will not let this happen.**

_In fact, now is the time to press forward, not the time to hide. [Now is the time to take drastic next steps to make sure that this electoral TRAGEDY never happens again!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=62ba9dd5cd&e=44b8c466b0)_

**This is why I have started a very important petition to audit Pima County – the second largest county in Arizona and another source of huge fraud on election night!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2108232d12&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| We have well over 33,000 signatures now, and we expect that we will hit our 500,000 in a month. But this is a huge effort – one well justified.

Here are just a few reasons that an audit of Pima county is critical to election integrity:
* There was a report to the DOJ that 35,000 fictitious votes had been inserted into the election in Pima County
* Pima County is the second largest county and protecting the ballot – especially – in populated areas – is a legislative responsibility.
* Pima County showed significant disruption of historical voting patterns similar to those found in Maricopa County
* Personally, many Pima County residents have reported to me directly that they received more than one ballot in the mail.

**Because of these things, it is my duty to call on the Arizona Legislature to conduct a forensic audit of Pima County!**

Why? Because we don’t just have the evidence of the crime scene, we have the whole thing.

We not only have the smoking gun, we know where the crime scene was committed, we know the victim, and we even know the perpetrator of the crime.

**And this is where I need your help. This is a massive endeavor – and we can grant evil no quarter, no refuge, no place to hide. Which is why I need your continued support.**
*****AUDIT PIMA*****
[_Please continue to support America’s Audit in Arizona with a generous donation of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more! We must Audit Pima!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=50be772717&e=44b8c466b0)

I want to leave you with a promise. As we push forward in the trenches in this Arizona Audit, as we push to uncover all of the misdeeds and midnight crimes of the Democrats, it can be easy to lose focus on how far we have come and what we are trying to do.

**Through a coordinated effort of Arizona Patriots, American Conservatives, and donors like you, we have rallied together a huge effort to show without a shadow of a doubt that the Democrats have been caught – red-handed.**

But the Fake News Media is protecting them, as they always do, and we need to push forward to make sure the Song of Liberty is sung above the mayhem of Fake News propaganda. And we need to take over the Secretary of State offices, those who control the elections, to lock down and protect our elections in the future – not just the present.

**And this is what I will do as Secretary of State. **

**_Never again will the Democrats steal an election from the Republicans. Never again will Arizona’s proud electors be falsely used against the wishes of the Arizona People. Arizona is a Red State. I will make sure it stays that way._**

[_Please support my campaign with a rush donation today of just $25, $50, or $100 to ensure that our electoral system is protected from the wiles of the radical left!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2dee2527ed&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
